theorems.source_text:
/-- Applying `n` zero-input NDM steps to a "clean" matrix whose `(0,0)` entry
is `a` and other entries are `0` produces another "clean" matrix whose `(0, 0)`
entry is `tanhIter n a`. -/
theorem emender_iter_zero_clean (n : ℕ) (a : ℝ) :
    iterUpdate (M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1)
        (Matrix.of (fun (r c : Fin 2) => if r = 0 ∧ c = 0 then a else 0))
        (zeroSteps n)
      = Matrix.of (fun (r c : Fin 2) =>
          if r = 0 ∧ c = 0 then tanhIter n a else 0) := by
  induction n generalizing a with
  | zero =>
    simp [iterUpdate, zeroSteps, tanhIter]
  | succ n ih =>
    simp only [zeroSteps, iterUpdate]
    have hstep :
        M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1
            (Matrix.of (fun (r c : Fin 2) => if r = 0 ∧ c = 0 then a else 0))
            (0 : TwoVec) (0 : TwoVec)
          = Matrix.of (fun (r c : Fin 2) =>
              if r = 0 ∧ c = 0 then Real.tanh a else 0) := by
      ext i j
      rw [emender_zero_step_on_clean_state]
      by_cases h : i = 0 ∧ j = 0 <;> simp [h, Matrix.of_apply]
    rw [hstep, ih]
    ext i j
    by_cases h : i = 0 ∧ j = 0
    · simp [h, Matrix.of_apply, tanhIter, tanhIter_tanh_comm]
    · simp [h, Matrix.of_apply]
theorems.signature:
∀ (n : ℕ) (a : ℝ),
  MultiStepSeparation.iterUpdate (M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1)
      (Matrix.of fun r c => if r = 0 ∧ c = 0 then a else 0) (MultiStepSeparation.zeroSteps n) =
    Matrix.of fun r c => if r = 0 ∧ c = 0 then MultiStepSeparation.tanhIter n a else 0
theorems.proof_body:
fun n a =>
  Nat.recAux (motive := fun n =>
    ∀ (a : ℝ),
      MultiStepSeparation.iterUpdate (M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1)
          (Matrix.of fun r c => if r = 0 ∧ c = 0 then a else 0) (MultiStepSeparation.zeroSteps n) =
        Matrix.of fun r c => if r = 0 ∧ c = 0 then MultiStepSeparation.tanhIter n a else 0)
    (fun a =>
      of_eq_true
        (Eq.trans
          (congrArg (fun x => (Matrix.of fun r c => if r = 0 ∧ c = 0 then a else 0) = Matrix.of x)
            (funext fun r =>
              funext fun c =>
                ite_congr (Eq.refl (r = 0 ∧ c = 0)) (fun a_1 => Eq.refl a) fun a => Eq.refl 0))
          (eq_self (Matrix.of fun r c => if r = 0 ∧ c = 0 then a else 0))))
    (fun n ih a =>
      id
        (have hstep :=
          Matrix.ext fun i j =>
            Eq.mpr
              (id
                (congrArg
                  (fun _a =>
                    _a = Matrix.of (fun r c => if r = 0 ∧ c = 0 then Real.tanh a else 0) i j)
                  (MultiStepSeparation.emender_zero_step_on_clean_state a i j)))
              (if h : i = 0 ∧ j = 0 then
                of_eq_true
                  (Eq.trans
                    (congr
                      (congrArg Eq
                        (ite_cond_eq_true (Real.tanh a) 0
                          (Eq.trans
                            (congr
                              (congrArg And (Eq.trans (congrArg (fun x => x = 0) h.1) (eq_self 0)))
                              (Eq.trans (congrArg (fun x => x = 0) h.2) (eq_self 0)))
                            (and_self True))))
                      (Eq.trans
                        (congr
                          (congrArg (Matrix.of fun r c => if r = 0 ∧ c = 0 then Real.tanh a else 0)
                            h.1)
                          h.2)
                        (ite_cond_eq_true (Real.tanh a) 0
                          (Eq.trans (congr (congrArg And (eq_self 0)) (eq_self 0))
                            (and_self True)))))
                    (eq_self (Real.tanh a)))
              else
                of_eq_true
                  (Eq.trans
                    (congr (congrArg Eq (ite_cond_eq_false (Real.tanh a) 0 (eq_false h)))
                      (ite_cond_eq_false (Real.tanh a) 0 (eq_false h)))
                    (eq_self 0)));
        Eq.mpr
          (id
            (congrArg
              (fun _a =>
                MultiStepSeparation.iterUpdate (M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1) _a
                    (MultiStepSeparation.zeroSteps n) =
                  Matrix.of fun r c =>
                    if r = 0 ∧ c = 0 then MultiStepSeparation.tanhIter (n + 1) a else 0)
              hstep))
          (Eq.mpr
            (id
              (congrArg
                (fun _a =>
                  _a =
                    Matrix.of fun r c =>
                      if r = 0 ∧ c = 0 then MultiStepSeparation.tanhIter (n + 1) a else 0)
                (ih (Real.tanh a))))
            (Matrix.ext fun i j =>
              if h : i = 0 ∧ j = 0 then
                of_eq_true
                  (Eq.trans
                    (congr
                      (congrArg Eq
                        (Eq.trans
                          (congr
                            (congr
                              (congrArg (⇑Matrix.of)
                                (funext fun r =>
                                  funext fun c =>
                                    ite_congr (Eq.refl (r = 0 ∧ c = 0))
                                      (fun a_1 => MultiStepSeparation.tanhIter_tanh_comm n a)
                                      fun a => Eq.refl 0))
                              h.1)
                            h.2)
                          (ite_cond_eq_true (Real.tanh (MultiStepSeparation.tanhIter n a)) 0
                            (Eq.trans (congr (congrArg And (eq_self 0)) (eq_self 0))
                              (and_self True)))))
                      (Eq.trans
                        (congr
                          (congr
                            (congrArg (⇑Matrix.of)
                              (funext fun r =>
                                funext fun c =>
                                  ite_congr (Eq.refl (r = 0 ∧ c = 0))
                                    (fun a_1 =>
                                      Eq.refl (Real.tanh (MultiStepSeparation.tanhIter n a)))
                                    fun a => Eq.refl 0))
                            h.1)
                          h.2)
                        (ite_cond_eq_true (Real.tanh (MultiStepSeparation.tanhIter n a)) 0
                          (Eq.trans (congr (congrArg And (eq_self 0)) (eq_self 0))
                            (and_self True)))))
                    (eq_self (Real.tanh (MultiStepSeparation.tanhIter n a))))
              else
                of_eq_true
                  (Eq.trans
                    (congr
                      (congrArg Eq
                        (ite_cond_eq_false (MultiStepSeparation.tanhIter n (Real.tanh a)) 0
                          (eq_false h)))
                      (ite_cond_eq_false (MultiStepSeparation.tanhIter (n + 1) a) 0 (eq_false h)))
                    (eq_self 0))))))
    n a
theorems.name: MultiStepSeparation.emender_iter_zero_clean
theorems.doc:
Applying `n` zero-input NDM steps to a "clean" matrix whose `(0,0)` entry
is `a` and other entries are `0` produces another "clean" matrix whose `(0, 0)`
entry is `tanhIter n a`.

theorems.source_text:
/-- Entry `(0, 0)` of the k-step NDM trajectory on the witness is
`tanhIter k (-1)` for every `k ≥ 1`. -/
theorem iterUpdate_emender_kStep_entry
    (k : ℕ) (hk : 1 ≤ k) :
    iterUpdate (M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1)
        lowerLeftState (kStepWitnessInputs k) 0 0
      = tanhIter k (-1) := by
  unfold kStepWitnessInputs
  simp only [iterUpdate]
  rw [emender_step1_clean_matrix, emender_iter_zero_clean]
  simp only [Matrix.of_apply, and_self, if_true]
  -- After rewriting, goal: tanhIter (k - 1) (Real.tanh (-1)) = tanhIter k (-1)
  rw [tanhIter_tanh_comm]
  -- Goal: Real.tanh (tanhIter (k - 1) (-1)) = tanhIter k (-1)
  have heq : tanhIter k (-1) = Real.tanh (tanhIter (k - 1) (-1)) := by
    have : k = (k - 1) + 1 := by omega
    conv_lhs => rw [this]
    rfl
  exact heq.symm
theorems.signature:
∀ (k : ℕ),
  1 ≤ k →
    MultiStepSeparation.iterUpdate (M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1)
        RecurrentResourceFormalism.lowerLeftState (MultiStepSeparation.kStepWitnessInputs k) 0 0 =
      MultiStepSeparation.tanhIter k (-1)
theorems.proof_body:
fun k hk =>
  id
    (id
      (Eq.mpr
        (id
          (congrArg
            (fun _a =>
              MultiStepSeparation.iterUpdate (M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1) _a
                  (MultiStepSeparation.zeroSteps (k - 1)) 0 0 =
                MultiStepSeparation.tanhIter k (-1))
            MultiStepSeparation.emender_step1_clean_matrix))
        (Eq.mpr
          (id
            (congrArg (fun _a => _a 0 0 = MultiStepSeparation.tanhIter k (-1))
              (MultiStepSeparation.emender_iter_zero_clean (k - 1) (Real.tanh (-1)))))
          (Eq.mpr
            (id
              (congrArg (fun x => x = MultiStepSeparation.tanhIter k (-1))
                (Eq.trans
                  (ite_congr
                    (Eq.trans (congr (congrArg And (eq_self 0)) (eq_self 0)) (and_self True))
                    (fun a => Eq.refl (MultiStepSeparation.tanhIter (k - 1) (Real.tanh (-1))))
                    fun a => Eq.refl 0)
                  (if_true (MultiStepSeparation.tanhIter (k - 1) (Real.tanh (-1))) 0))))
            (Eq.mpr
              (id
                (congrArg (fun _a => _a = MultiStepSeparation.tanhIter k (-1))
                  (MultiStepSeparation.tanhIter_tanh_comm (k - 1) (-1))))
              (have heq :=
                have this :=
                  Decidable.byContradiction fun a =>
                    MultiStepSeparation.iterUpdate_emender_kStep_entry._proof_1_4 k hk a;
                Eq.mpr
                  (id
                    ((fun a a_1 e_a =>
                        Eq.rec (motive := fun a_2 e_a => ∀ (a_3 : ℝ), (a = a_3) = (a_2 = a_3))
                          (fun a_2 => Eq.refl (a = a_2)) e_a)
                      (MultiStepSeparation.tanhIter k (-1))
                      (MultiStepSeparation.tanhIter (k - 1 + 1) (-1))
                      (Eq.trans (congrArg (fun _a => MultiStepSeparation.tanhIter _a (-1)) this)
                        (Eq.refl (MultiStepSeparation.tanhIter (k - 1 + 1) (-1))))
                      (Real.tanh (MultiStepSeparation.tanhIter (k - 1) (-1)))))
                  (Eq.refl (MultiStepSeparation.tanhIter (k - 1 + 1) (-1)));
              Eq.symm heq))))))
theorems.name: MultiStepSeparation.iterUpdate_emender_kStep_entry
theorems.doc:
Entry `(0, 0)` of the k-step NDM trajectory on the witness is
`tanhIter k (-1)` for every `k ≥ 1`.

theorems.source_text:
/-- **k-step separation theorem (extension of Milestone 1).**

For every `k ≥ 1` and every fixed-right raw-write M2RNN-style resource, the
`k`-step trajectory of the resource on the witness input differs from NDM's
`k`-step trajectory on the same input. The distinguishing entry is `(0, 0)`:

* NDM produces `tanhIter k (-1)`, nonzero for every `k ≥ 0` (by injectivity).
* The resource produces exactly `0`, by row-0 zero preservation.

The witness input is `kStepWitnessInputs k = [(mixedKey, 0), (0, 0), …, (0, 0)]`
(length `k`) starting from `lowerLeftState`.

This shows the one-step separation does not wash out over composition: it
strictly persists for every finite length. The result generalizes
`emender_m2rnn_two_step_separation` and constitutes the cleanest Lean ceiling
reachable on the multi-step composition axis. -/
theorem emender_m2rnn_k_step_separation
    (k : ℕ) (hk : 1 ≤ k) (resource : FixedRightRawExternalForget2) :
    iterUpdate resource.update lowerLeftState (kStepWitnessInputs k) ≠
      iterUpdate (M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1)
        lowerLeftState (kStepWitnessInputs k) := by
  intro hEq
  have hEntry := congrFun (congrFun hEq 0) 0
  rw [iterUpdate_m2rnn_kStep_entry_zero resource k hk,
      iterUpdate_emender_kStep_entry k hk] at hEntry
  exact tanhIter_ne_zero_of_ne_zero k (-1) (by norm_num) hEntry.symm
theorems.signature:
∀ (k : ℕ),
  1 ≤ k →
    ∀ (resource : RecurrentResourceFormalism.FixedRightRawExternalForget2),
      MultiStepSeparation.iterUpdate resource.update RecurrentResourceFormalism.lowerLeftState
          (MultiStepSeparation.kStepWitnessInputs k) ≠
        MultiStepSeparation.iterUpdate (M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1)
          RecurrentResourceFormalism.lowerLeftState (MultiStepSeparation.kStepWitnessInputs k)
theorems.proof_body:
fun k hk resource hEq =>
  have hEntry := congrFun (congrFun hEq 0) 0;
  MultiStepSeparation.tanhIter_ne_zero_of_ne_zero k (-1)
    (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isInt_eq_false
      (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isInt_neg (Eq.refl Neg.neg)
        (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.to_isInt (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isNat_ofNat ℝ Nat.cast_one))
        (Eq.refl (Int.negOfNat 1)))
      (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.to_isInt (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isNat_ofNat ℝ Nat.cast_zero))
      (Eq.refl false))
    (Eq.symm
      (Eq.mp (congrArg (fun _a => 0 = _a) (MultiStepSeparation.iterUpdate_emender_kStep_entry k hk))
        (Eq.mp
          (congrArg
            (fun _a =>
              _a =
                MultiStepSeparation.iterUpdate (M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1)
                  RecurrentResourceFormalism.lowerLeftState
                  (MultiStepSeparation.kStepWitnessInputs k) 0 0)
            (MultiStepSeparation.iterUpdate_m2rnn_kStep_entry_zero resource k hk))
          hEntry)))
theorems.name: MultiStepSeparation.emender_m2rnn_k_step_separation
theorems.doc:
**k-step separation theorem (extension of Milestone 1).**

For every `k ≥ 1` and every fixed-right raw-write M2RNN-style resource, the
`k`-step trajectory of the resource on the witness input differs from NDM's
`k`-step trajectory on the same input. The distinguishing entry is `(0, 0)`:

* NDM produces `tanhIter k (-1)`, nonzero for every `k ≥ 0` (by injectivity).
* The resource produces exactly `0`, by row-0 zero preservation.

The witness input is `kStepWitnessInputs k = [(mixedKey, 0), (0, 0), …, (0, 0)]`
(length `k`) starting from `lowerLeftState`.

This shows the one-step separation does not wash out over composition: it
strictly persists for every finite length. The result generalizes
`emender_m2rnn_two_step_separation` and constitutes the cleanest Lean ceiling
reachable on the multi-step composition axis.

theorems.source_text:
/-- **k-step separation in existential form.** For every `k ≥ 1` and every
fixed-right raw-write resource, there is a `k`-token input sequence on which
the `k`-step composition differs from NDM. -/
theorem emender_m2rnn_k_step_separation_exists
    (k : ℕ) (hk : 1 ≤ k) (resource : FixedRightRawExternalForget2) :
    ∃ (H0 : TwoMat) (inputs : List (TwoVec × TwoVec)),
      inputs.length = k ∧
      iterUpdate resource.update H0 inputs ≠
        iterUpdate (M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1) H0 inputs := by
  refine ⟨lowerLeftState, kStepWitnessInputs k, ?_,
    emender_m2rnn_k_step_separation k hk resource⟩
  -- Length of kStepWitnessInputs k is k for k ≥ 1.
  unfold kStepWitnessInputs
  have hlen : (zeroSteps (k - 1)).length = k - 1 := by
    induction (k - 1) with
    | zero => simp [zeroSteps]
    | succ n ih => simp [zeroSteps, List.length_cons, ih]
  simp [List.length_cons, hlen]
  omega
theorems.signature:
∀ (k : ℕ),
  1 ≤ k →
    ∀ (resource : RecurrentResourceFormalism.FixedRightRawExternalForget2),
      ∃ H0 inputs,
        inputs.length = k ∧
          MultiStepSeparation.iterUpdate resource.update H0 inputs ≠
            MultiStepSeparation.iterUpdate (M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1) H0 inputs
theorems.proof_body:
fun k hk resource =>
  Exists.intro RecurrentResourceFormalism.lowerLeftState
    (Exists.intro (MultiStepSeparation.kStepWitnessInputs k)
      ⟨id
          (have hlen :=
            Nat.recAux (of_eq_true (eq_self 0))
              (fun n ih =>
                of_eq_true
                  (Eq.trans
                    (Eq.trans (congrArg (fun x => x + 1 = n + 1) ih)
                      Nat.add_left_cancel_iff._simp_1)
                    (eq_self 1)))
              (k - 1);
          Eq.mpr (id (congrArg (fun x => x + 1 = k) hlen))
            (Decidable.byContradiction fun a =>
              MultiStepSeparation.emender_m2rnn_k_step_separation_exists._proof_1_4 k hk a)),
        MultiStepSeparation.emender_m2rnn_k_step_separation k hk resource⟩)
theorems.name: MultiStepSeparation.emender_m2rnn_k_step_separation_exists
theorems.doc:
**k-step separation in existential form.** For every `k ≥ 1` and every
fixed-right raw-write resource, there is a `k`-token input sequence on which
the `k`-step composition differs from NDM.

/-- Row 0 of the M2RNN candidate is zero in KV when row 0 of `H` is zero and
`v = 0`. -/
theorem m2rnnCandidate_row0_zero_at_zero_row_KV
    (W : Matrix (Fin V) (Fin V) Real) (k : Vec K)
    (H : MatState K V)
    (hrow : ∀ j, H (i0 hK) j = 0) (j : Fin V) :
    m2rnnCandidate W H k (0 : Vec V) (i0 hK) j = 0 := by
  simp [m2rnnCandidate, matrixTanh, matrixMap, outerKV,
    Matrix.mul_apply, hrow]
theorems.signature:
∀ {K V : ℕ} (hK : 1 < K) (W : Matrix (Fin V) (Fin V) ℝ) (k : M2RNNComparison.Vec K)
  (H : M2RNNComparison.MatState K V),
  (∀ (j : Fin V), H (MultiStepSeparation.i0 hK) j = 0) →
    ∀ (j : Fin V), M2RNNComparison.m2rnnCandidate W H k 0 (MultiStepSeparation.i0 hK) j = 0
theorems.proof_body:
fun {K V} hK W k H hrow j =>
  of_eq_true
    (Eq.trans
      (congrArg (fun x => x = 0)
        (Eq.trans
          (congrArg (fun x => Matrix.of x (MultiStepSeparation.i0 hK) j)
            (funext fun i =>
              funext fun j =>
                congrArg Real.tanh
                  (Eq.trans
                    (congrArg (fun x => (H * W + Matrix.of x) i j)
                      (funext fun i => funext fun j => mul_zero (k i)))
                    (add_zero (∑ j_1, H i j_1 * W j_1 j)))))
          (Eq.trans
            (congrArg Real.tanh
              (Eq.trans
                (Finset.sum_congr (Eq.refl Finset.univ) fun x a =>
                  Eq.trans (congrArg (fun x_1 => x_1 * W x j) ((fun j => hrow j) x))
                    (zero_mul (W x j)))
                Finset.sum_const_zero))
            Real.tanh_zero)))
      (eq_self 0))
theorems.name: MultiStepSeparation.m2rnnCandidate_row0_zero_at_zero_row_KV
theorems.doc:
Row 0 of the M2RNN candidate is zero in KV when row 0 of `H` is zero and
`v = 0`.

theorems.source_text:
/-- Row 0 of `m2rnnRowForgetUpdateKV` is zero when row 0 of `H` is zero
and `v = 0`. -/
theorem m2rnnRowForgetUpdateKV_row0_zero
    (W : Matrix (Fin V) (Fin V) Real) (r : Vec K) (k : Vec K)
    (H : MatState K V)
    (hrow : ∀ j, H (i0 hK) j = 0) (j : Fin V) :
    m2rnnRowForgetUpdateKV W r H k (0 : Vec V) (i0 hK) j = 0 := by
  have hcand : m2rnnCandidate W H k (0 : Vec V) (i0 hK) j = 0 :=
    m2rnnCandidate_row0_zero_at_zero_row_KV hK W k H hrow j
  simp [m2rnnRowForgetUpdateKV, rowForgetCarryKV, hrow, hcand]
theorems.signature:
∀ {K V : ℕ} (hK : 1 < K) (W : Matrix (Fin V) (Fin V) ℝ) (r k : M2RNNComparison.Vec K)
  (H : M2RNNComparison.MatState K V),
  (∀ (j : Fin V), H (MultiStepSeparation.i0 hK) j = 0) →
    ∀ (j : Fin V),
      RecurrentResourceFormalism.m2rnnRowForgetUpdateKV W r H k 0 (MultiStepSeparation.i0 hK) j = 0
theorems.proof_body:
fun {K V} hK W r k H hrow j =>
  have hcand := MultiStepSeparation.m2rnnCandidate_row0_zero_at_zero_row_KV hK W k H hrow j;
  of_eq_true
    (Eq.trans
      (congrArg (fun x => x = 0)
        (Eq.trans
          (congr
            (congrArg HAdd.hAdd
              (Eq.trans (congrArg (HMul.hMul (r (MultiStepSeparation.i0 hK))) ((fun j => hrow j) j))
                (mul_zero (r (MultiStepSeparation.i0 hK)))))
            (Eq.trans (congrArg (HMul.hMul (1 - r (MultiStepSeparation.i0 hK))) hcand)
              (mul_zero (1 - r (MultiStepSeparation.i0 hK)))))
          (add_zero 0)))
      (eq_self 0))
theorems.name: MultiStepSeparation.m2rnnRowForgetUpdateKV_row0_zero
theorems.doc:
Row 0 of `m2rnnRowForgetUpdateKV` is zero when row 0 of `H` is zero
and `v = 0`.

theorems.source_text:
/-- Row 0 of `m2rnnColumnForgetUpdateKV` is zero when row 0 of `H` is zero
and `v = 0`. -/
theorem m2rnnColumnForgetUpdateKV_row0_zero
    (W : Matrix (Fin V) (Fin V) Real) (c : Vec V) (k : Vec K)
    (H : MatState K V)
    (hrow : ∀ j, H (i0 hK) j = 0) (j : Fin V) :
    m2rnnColumnForgetUpdateKV W c H k (0 : Vec V) (i0 hK) j = 0 := by
  have hcand : m2rnnCandidate W H k (0 : Vec V) (i0 hK) j = 0 :=
    m2rnnCandidate_row0_zero_at_zero_row_KV hK W k H hrow j
  simp [m2rnnColumnForgetUpdateKV, columnForgetCarryKV, hrow, hcand]
theorems.signature:
∀ {K V : ℕ} (hK : 1 < K) (W : Matrix (Fin V) (Fin V) ℝ) (c : M2RNNComparison.Vec V)
  (k : M2RNNComparison.Vec K) (H : M2RNNComparison.MatState K V),
  (∀ (j : Fin V), H (MultiStepSeparation.i0 hK) j = 0) →
    ∀ (j : Fin V),
      RecurrentResourceFormalism.m2rnnColumnForgetUpdateKV W c H k 0 (MultiStepSeparation.i0 hK) j =
        0
theorems.proof_body:
fun {K V} hK W c k H hrow j =>
  have hcand := MultiStepSeparation.m2rnnCandidate_row0_zero_at_zero_row_KV hK W k H hrow j;
  of_eq_true
    (Eq.trans
      (congrArg (fun x => x = 0)
        (Eq.trans
          (congr
            (congrArg HAdd.hAdd
              (Eq.trans (congrArg (HMul.hMul (c j)) ((fun j => hrow j) j)) (mul_zero (c j))))
            (Eq.trans (congrArg (HMul.hMul (1 - c j)) hcand) (mul_zero (1 - c j))))
          (add_zero 0)))
      (eq_self 0))

Row 0 of `m2rnnColumnForgetUpdateKV` is zero when row 0 of `H` is zero

/-- Row 0 of `m2rnnCellForgetUpdateKV` is zero when row 0 of `H` is zero
and `v = 0`. -/

    (W : Matrix (Fin V) (Fin V) Real) (g : MatState K V) (k : Vec K)
    (H : MatState K V)

theorems.signature:
∀ {K V : ℕ} (hK : 1 < K) (W : Matrix (Fin V) (Fin V) ℝ) (g : M2RNNComparison.MatState K V)
  (k : M2RNNComparison.Vec K) (H : M2RNNComparison.MatState K V),
  (∀ (j : Fin V), H (MultiStepSeparation.i0 hK) j = 0) →
    ∀ (j : Fin V),
      RecurrentResourceFormalism.m2rnnCellForgetUpdateKV W g H k 0 (MultiStepSeparation.i0 hK) j = 0
theorems.proof_body:
fun {K V} hK W g k H hrow j =>
  have hcand := MultiStepSeparation.m2rnnCandidate_row0_zero_at_zero_row_KV hK W k H hrow j;
  of_eq_true
    (Eq.trans
      (congrArg (fun x => x = 0)
        (Eq.trans
          (congr
            (congrArg HAdd.hAdd
              (Eq.trans
                (congrArg (HMul.hMul (g (MultiStepSeparation.i0 hK) j)) ((fun j => hrow j) j))
                (mul_zero (g (MultiStepSeparation.i0 hK) j))))
            (Eq.trans (congrArg (HMul.hMul (1 - g (MultiStepSeparation.i0 hK) j)) hcand)
              (mul_zero (1 - g (MultiStepSeparation.i0 hK) j))))
          (add_zero 0)))
      (eq_self 0))

theorems.doc:
Row 0 of `m2rnnCellForgetUpdateKV` is zero when row 0 of `H` is zero

theorems.source_text:
/-- Generic zero-row preservation for the KV resource class. -/
theorem FixedRightRawExternalForgetKV_preserves_zero_row
    (resource : FixedRightRawExternalForgetKV K V)
    (k : Vec K) (H : MatState K V)
    (hrow : ∀ j, H (i0 hK) j = 0) (j : Fin V) :
    resource.update H k (0 : Vec V) (i0 hK) j = 0 := by
  cases resource with
  | row W r => exact m2rnnRowForgetUpdateKV_row0_zero hK W r k H hrow j
  | column W c => exact m2rnnColumnForgetUpdateKV_row0_zero hK W c k H hrow j
  | cell W g => exact m2rnnCellForgetUpdateKV_row0_zero hK W g k H hrow j
theorems.signature:
∀ {K V : ℕ} (hK : 1 < K) (resource : RecurrentResourceFormalism.FixedRightRawExternalForgetKV K V)
  (k : M2RNNComparison.Vec K) (H : M2RNNComparison.MatState K V),
  (∀ (j : Fin V), H (MultiStepSeparation.i0 hK) j = 0) →
    ∀ (j : Fin V), resource.update H k 0 (MultiStepSeparation.i0 hK) j = 0
theorems.proof_body:
fun {K V} hK resource k H hrow j =>
  RecurrentResourceFormalism.FixedRightRawExternalForgetKV.casesOn (motive := fun t =>
    resource = t → resource.update H k 0 (MultiStepSeparation.i0 hK) j = 0) resource
    (fun W r h =>
      Eq.symm h ▸ MultiStepSeparation.m2rnnRowForgetUpdateKV_row0_zero hK W r k H hrow j)
    (fun W c h =>
      Eq.symm h ▸ MultiStepSeparation.m2rnnColumnForgetUpdateKV_row0_zero hK W c k H hrow j)
    (fun W g h =>
      Eq.symm h ▸ MultiStepSeparation.m2rnnCellForgetUpdateKV_row0_zero hK W g k H hrow j)
    (Eq.refl resource)
theorems.name: MultiStepSeparation.FixedRightRawExternalForgetKV_preserves_zero_row
theorems.doc: Generic zero-row preservation for the KV resource class.

theorems.source_text:
/-- The one-step update type for KV. -/
abbrev OneStepUpdateKV (K V : Nat) :=
  MatState K V → Vec K → Vec V → MatState K V
theorems.signature: ℕ → ℕ → Type
theorems.proof_body:
fun K V =>
  M2RNNComparison.MatState K V →
    M2RNNComparison.Vec K → M2RNNComparison.Vec V → M2RNNComparison.MatState K V
theorems.name: MultiStepSeparation.OneStepUpdateKV
theorems.doc: The one-step update type for KV.

theorems.source_text:
/-- Iterated KV update over a list of inputs. -/
def iterUpdateKV (update : OneStepUpdateKV K V) (H : MatState K V) :
    List (Vec K × Vec V) → MatState K V
  | [] => H
  | (k, v) :: rest => iterUpdateKV update (update H k v) rest
theorems.signature:
{K V : ℕ} →
  MultiStepSeparation.OneStepUpdateKV K V →
    M2RNNComparison.MatState K V →
      List (M2RNNComparison.Vec K × M2RNNComparison.Vec V) → M2RNNComparison.MatState K V
theorems.proof_body:
fun {K V} update H x =>
  List.brecOn (motive := fun x => M2RNNComparison.MatState K V → M2RNNComparison.MatState K V) x
    (fun x f H =>
      (match (motive :=
          (x : List (M2RNNComparison.Vec K × M2RNNComparison.Vec V)) →
            List.below (motive := fun x =>
                M2RNNComparison.MatState K V → M2RNNComparison.MatState K V) x →
              M2RNNComparison.MatState K V)
          x with
        | [] => fun x => H
        | (k, v) :: rest => fun x => x.1 (update H k v))
        f)
    H
theorems.name: MultiStepSeparation.iterUpdateKV
theorems.doc: Iterated KV update over a list of inputs.

theorems.source_text:
/-- List of `n` zero steps in KV. -/
def zeroStepsKV (K V : Nat) : ℕ → List (Vec K × Vec V)
  | 0 => []
  | n + 1 => ((0 : Vec K), (0 : Vec V)) :: zeroStepsKV K V n
theorems.signature: (K V : ℕ) → ℕ → List (M2RNNComparison.Vec K × M2RNNComparison.Vec V)
theorems.proof_body:
fun K V x =>
  Nat.brecOn x fun x f =>
    (match (motive := (x : ℕ) → Nat.below x → List (M2RNNComparison.Vec K × M2RNNComparison.Vec V))
        x with
      | 0 => fun x => []
      | n.succ => fun x => (0, 0) :: x.1)
      f
theorems.name: MultiStepSeparation.zeroStepsKV
theorems.doc: List of `n` zero steps in KV.

theorems.source_text:
/-- KV-dimensional k-step witness input: one witness step followed by `(k - 1)`
zero steps. -/
def kStepWitnessInputsKV (hK : 1 < K) (k : ℕ) : List (Vec K × Vec V) :=
  (embeddedMixedKey hK, (0 : Vec V)) :: zeroStepsKV K V (k - 1)
theorems.signature: {K V : ℕ} → 1 < K → ℕ → List (M2RNNComparison.Vec K × M2RNNComparison.Vec V)
theorems.proof_body:
fun {K V} hK k =>
  (RecurrentResourceFormalism.embeddedMixedKey hK, 0) :: MultiStepSeparation.zeroStepsKV K V (k - 1)
theorems.name: MultiStepSeparation.kStepWitnessInputsKV
theorems.doc:
KV-dimensional k-step witness input: one witness step followed by `(k - 1)`
zero steps.

theorems.source_text:
/-- Iterating any KV M2RNN resource over zero-input steps preserves zero-row-0. -/
theorem iterUpdateKV_zeroSteps_preserves_row0
    (resource : FixedRightRawExternalForgetKV K V)
    (H : MatState K V) (hrow : ∀ j, H (i0 hK) j = 0) (n : ℕ) (j : Fin V) :
    iterUpdateKV resource.update H (zeroStepsKV K V n) (i0 hK) j = 0 := by
  induction n generalizing H with
  | zero => simpa [iterUpdateKV, zeroStepsKV] using hrow j
  | succ n ih =>
    simp only [zeroStepsKV, iterUpdateKV]
    apply ih
    intro j'
    exact FixedRightRawExternalForgetKV_preserves_zero_row hK resource
      (0 : Vec K) H hrow j'
theorems.signature:
∀ {K V : ℕ} (hK : 1 < K) (resource : RecurrentResourceFormalism.FixedRightRawExternalForgetKV K V)
  (H : M2RNNComparison.MatState K V),
  (∀ (j : Fin V), H (MultiStepSeparation.i0 hK) j = 0) →
    ∀ (n : ℕ) (j : Fin V),
      MultiStepSeparation.iterUpdateKV resource.update H (MultiStepSeparation.zeroStepsKV K V n)
          (MultiStepSeparation.i0 hK) j =
        0
theorems.proof_body:
fun {K V} hK resource H hrow n j =>
  Nat.recAux (motive := fun n =>
    ∀ (H : M2RNNComparison.MatState K V),
      (∀ (j : Fin V), H (MultiStepSeparation.i0 hK) j = 0) →
        MultiStepSeparation.iterUpdateKV resource.update H (MultiStepSeparation.zeroStepsKV K V n)
            (MultiStepSeparation.i0 hK) j =
          0)
    (fun H hrow => id (hrow j))
    (fun n ih H hrow =>
      id
        (ih (resource.update H 0 0) fun j' =>
          MultiStepSeparation.FixedRightRawExternalForgetKV_preserves_zero_row hK resource 0 H hrow
            j'))
    n H hrow
theorems.name: MultiStepSeparation.iterUpdateKV_zeroSteps_preserves_row0
theorems.doc: Iterating any KV M2RNN resource over zero-input steps preserves zero-row-0.

theorems.source_text:
/-- Entry `(i₀, j₀)` of the k-step KV M2RNN trajectory on the embedded witness
is `0` for every `k ≥ 1`. -/
theorem iterUpdateKV_m2rnn_kStep_entry_zero
    (resource : FixedRightRawExternalForgetKV K V) (k : ℕ) (hk : 1 ≤ k) :
    iterUpdateKV resource.update (embeddedLowerLeftState hK hV)
        (kStepWitnessInputsKV hK k) (i0 hK) (j0 hV) = 0 := by
  unfold kStepWitnessInputsKV
  simp only [iterUpdateKV]
  have hrow0 : ∀ j, embeddedLowerLeftState hK hV (i0 hK) j = 0 :=
    embeddedLowerLeftState_row0 hK hV
  have hrow1 : ∀ j, resource.update (embeddedLowerLeftState hK hV)
      (embeddedMixedKey hK) (0 : Vec V) (i0 hK) j = 0 := by
    intro j
    exact FixedRightRawExternalForgetKV_preserves_zero_row hK resource
      (embeddedMixedKey hK) (embeddedLowerLeftState hK hV) hrow0 j
  exact iterUpdateKV_zeroSteps_preserves_row0 hK resource
    (resource.update (embeddedLowerLeftState hK hV)
      (embeddedMixedKey hK) (0 : Vec V)) hrow1 (k - 1) (j0 hV)
theorems.signature:
∀ {K V : ℕ} (hK : 1 < K) (hV : 0 < V)
  (resource : RecurrentResourceFormalism.FixedRightRawExternalForgetKV K V) (k : ℕ),
  1 ≤ k →
    MultiStepSeparation.iterUpdateKV resource.update
        (RecurrentResourceFormalism.embeddedLowerLeftState hK hV)
        (MultiStepSeparation.kStepWitnessInputsKV hK k) (MultiStepSeparation.i0 hK)
        (MultiStepSeparation.j0 hV) =
      0
theorems.proof_body:
fun {K V} hK hV resource k hk =>
  id
    (id
      (have hrow0 := MultiStepSeparation.embeddedLowerLeftState_row0 hK hV;
      have hrow1 := fun j =>
        MultiStepSeparation.FixedRightRawExternalForgetKV_preserves_zero_row hK resource
          (RecurrentResourceFormalism.embeddedMixedKey hK)
          (RecurrentResourceFormalism.embeddedLowerLeftState hK hV) hrow0 j;
      MultiStepSeparation.iterUpdateKV_zeroSteps_preserves_row0 hK resource
        (resource.update (RecurrentResourceFormalism.embeddedLowerLeftState hK hV)
          (RecurrentResourceFormalism.embeddedMixedKey hK) 0)
        hrow1 (k - 1) (MultiStepSeparation.j0 hV)))
theorems.name: MultiStepSeparation.iterUpdateKV_m2rnn_kStep_entry_zero
theorems.doc:
Entry `(i₀, j₀)` of the k-step KV M2RNN trajectory on the embedded witness
is `0` for every `k ≥ 1`.

  OnlineMemory.Memory K V →
    OnlineMemory.KeyVec K → OnlineMemory.ValueVec V → OnlineMemory.ValueVec V

theorems.source_text:
/-- Ideal delta-correcting write:

`S' = S + k (v - read S k)^T`.
-/
def linearDeltaWrite
    (S : Memory K V) (k : KeyVec K) (v : ValueVec V) : Memory K V :=
  S + M2RNNComparison.outerKV k (correction S k v)
theorems.signature:
{K V : ℕ} →
  OnlineMemory.Memory K V →
    OnlineMemory.KeyVec K → OnlineMemory.ValueVec V → OnlineMemory.Memory K V
theorems.proof_body: fun {K V} S k v => S + M2RNNComparison.outerKV k (OnlineMemory.correction S k v)
theorems.name: OnlineMemory.linearDeltaWrite
theorems.doc:
Ideal delta-correcting write:

`S' = S + k (v - read S k)^T`.

theorems.source_text:
/-- Raw outer-product write:

`S' = S + k v^T`.

This is the common raw associative-memory core. It can add an association, but
without state-dependent correction it does not implement overwrite for arbitrary
existing memory.
-/
def rawOuterWrite
    (S : Memory K V) (k : KeyVec K) (v : ValueVec V) : Memory K V :=
  S + M2RNNComparison.outerKV k v
theorems.signature:
{K V : ℕ} →
  OnlineMemory.Memory K V →
    OnlineMemory.KeyVec K → OnlineMemory.ValueVec V → OnlineMemory.Memory K V
theorems.proof_body: fun {K V} S k v => S + M2RNNComparison.outerKV k v
theorems.name: OnlineMemory.rawOuterWrite
theorems.doc:
Raw outer-product write:

`S' = S + k v^T`.

This is the common raw associative-memory core. It can add an association, but
without state-dependent correction it does not implement overwrite for arbitrary
existing memory.

/-- General state-independent additive write. The added matrix may depend on the
current key and desired value, but not on the old memory `S`. -/
def stateIndependentAdditiveWrite
    (term : KeyVec K → ValueVec V → Memory K V)
    (S : Memory K V) (k : KeyVec K) (v : ValueVec V) : Memory K V :=
  S + term k v

theorems.source_text:
/-- Reads distribute over matrix addition. -/
theorem read_add
    (A B : Memory K V) (q : KeyVec K) :
    read (A + B) q = read A q + read B q := by
  ext j
  simp [read, M2RNNComparison.queryReadout, Matrix.mulVec, dotProduct]
  calc
    Finset.univ.sum (fun x : Fin K => (A x j + B x j) * q x)
        =
      Finset.univ.sum (fun x : Fin K => A x j * q x + B x j * q x) := by
        apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
        intro i _
        ring
    _ =
      Finset.univ.sum (fun x : Fin K => A x j * q x) +

/-- Reading an outer-product write returns the written value scaled by key
overlap. -/
theorem read_outerKV
    (k q : KeyVec K) (e : ValueVec V) :
    read (M2RNNComparison.outerKV k e) q =
      fun j => keyDot k q * e j := by
  ext j
  simp [read, M2RNNComparison.queryReadout, M2RNNComparison.outerKV,
    keyDot, Matrix.mulVec, dotProduct]
  calc
    Finset.univ.sum (fun x : Fin K => k x * e j * q x)
        = Finset.univ.sum (fun x : Fin K => (k x * q x) * e j) := by
          apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
          intro i _
          ring
    _ = (Finset.univ.sum fun i : Fin K => k i * q i) * e j := by
          rw [Finset.sum_mul]
    _ = (Finset.univ.sum fun i : Fin K => k i * q i) * e j := rfl
theorems.signature:
∀ {K V : ℕ} (k q : OnlineMemory.KeyVec K) (e : OnlineMemory.ValueVec V),
  OnlineMemory.read (M2RNNComparison.outerKV k e) q = fun j => OnlineMemory.keyDot k q * e j
theorems.proof_body:
fun {K V} k q e =>
  funext fun j =>
    Eq.mpr
      (id
        (congrArg (fun x => x = (∑ i, k i * q i) * e j)
          (Finset.sum_congr (Eq.refl Finset.univ) fun x a => Eq.refl (k x * e j * q x))))
      (Trans.trans
        (Trans.trans
          (Finset.sum_congr rfl fun i a =>
            Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.of_eq
              (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_congr
                (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_congr (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.atom_pf (k i))
                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.atom_pf (e j))
                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_mul
                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_add
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_pf_left (k i) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_pf_right (e j) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                          (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.one_mul (Nat.rawCast 1))))
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_zero (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1))
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_zero
                        (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (e j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1) + 0)))
                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.zero_mul (e j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1 + 0))
                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_zero
                      (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (e j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1) + 0))))
                (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.atom_pf (q i))
                (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_mul
                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_add
                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_pf_left (k i) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_pf_left (e j) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_pf_right (q i) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                          (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.one_mul (Nat.rawCast 1)))))
                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_zero
                      (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (e j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1)))
                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_zero
                      (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 *
                          (e j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (q i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1)) +
                        0)))
                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.zero_mul (q i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1 + 0))
                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_zero
                    (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 *
                        (e j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (q i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1)) +
                      0))))
              (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_congr
                (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_congr (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.atom_pf (k i))
                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.atom_pf (q i))
                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_mul
                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_add
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_pf_left (k i) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_pf_right (q i) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                          (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.one_mul (Nat.rawCast 1))))
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_zero (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1))
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_zero
                        (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (q i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1) + 0)))
                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.zero_mul (q i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1 + 0))
                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_zero
                      (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (q i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1) + 0))))
                (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.atom_pf (e j))
                (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_mul
                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_add
                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_pf_left (k i) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_pf_right (e j) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_pf_left (q i) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                          (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.one_mul (Nat.rawCast 1)))))
                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_zero
                      (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (q i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1)))
                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_zero
                      (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 *
                          (e j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (q i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1)) +
                        0)))
                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.zero_mul (e j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1 + 0))
                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_zero
                    (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 *
                        (e j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (q i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1)) +
                      0)))))
          (Eq.mpr
            (id
              (congrArg (fun _a => ∑ x, k x * q x * e j = _a)
                (Finset.sum_mul Finset.univ (fun i => k i * q i) (e j))))
            (Eq.refl (∑ x, k x * q x * e j))))
        rfl)

/-- Delta write changes a query in proportion to its overlap with the write key. -/
theorem read_linearDeltaWrite
    (S : Memory K V) (k q : KeyVec K) (v : ValueVec V) :
    read (linearDeltaWrite S k v) q =
      read S q + fun j => keyDot k q * correction S k v j := by
  ext j
  simp [linearDeltaWrite, read, correction, M2RNNComparison.queryReadout,
    M2RNNComparison.outerKV, keyDot, Matrix.mulVec, dotProduct]
  calc
    Finset.univ.sum
        (fun x : Fin K => (S x j + k x * (v j - Finset.univ.sum (fun x => S x j * k x))) * q x)
        =
      Finset.univ.sum
        (fun x : Fin K =>
          S x j * q x + (k x * q x) * (v j - Finset.univ.sum (fun x => S x j * k x))) := by
          apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
          intro i _
          ring
    _ =
      Finset.univ.sum (fun x : Fin K => S x j * q x) +
      Finset.univ.sum
        (fun x : Fin K => (k x * q x) * (v j - Finset.univ.sum (fun x => S x j * k x))) := by
          rw [Finset.sum_add_distrib]
    _ =
      Finset.univ.sum (fun x : Fin K => S x j * q x) +
      (Finset.univ.sum fun i : Fin K => k i * q i) *
        (v j - Finset.univ.sum (fun x => S x j * k x)) := by
          rw [Finset.sum_mul]
theorems.signature:
∀ {K V : ℕ} (S : OnlineMemory.Memory K V) (k q : OnlineMemory.KeyVec K)
  (v : OnlineMemory.ValueVec V),
  OnlineMemory.read (OnlineMemory.linearDeltaWrite S k v) q =
    OnlineMemory.read S q + fun j => OnlineMemory.keyDot k q * OnlineMemory.correction S k v j
theorems.proof_body:
fun {K V} S k q v =>
  funext fun j =>
    Eq.mpr
      (id
        (congr
          (congrArg Eq
            (Finset.sum_congr (Eq.refl Finset.univ) fun x a =>
              congrArg (fun x_1 => Matrix.transpose (S + Matrix.of x_1) j x * q x)
                (funext fun i =>
                  funext fun j =>
                    congrArg (fun x => k i * (v j - x))
                      (Finset.sum_congr (Eq.refl Finset.univ) fun x a => Eq.refl (S x j * k x)))))
          (Eq.trans
            (congrArg (fun x => ((Matrix.transpose S).mulVec q + x) j)
              (funext fun j =>
                congrArg (fun x => (∑ i, k i * q i) * (v j - x))
                  (Finset.sum_congr (Eq.refl Finset.univ) fun x a => Eq.refl (S x j * k x))))
            (congrArg (fun x => x + (∑ i, k i * q i) * (v j - ∑ x, S x j * k x))
              (Finset.sum_congr (Eq.refl Finset.univ) fun x a => Eq.refl (S x j * q x))))))
      (Trans.trans
        (Trans.trans
          (Finset.sum_congr rfl fun i a =>
            Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.of_eq
              (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_congr
                (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_congr (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.atom_pf (S i j))
                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_congr (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.atom_pf (k i))
                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.sub_congr (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.atom_pf (v j))
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.atom_pf (∑ x, S x j * k x))
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.sub_pf
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_add
                          (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_mul (∑ x, S x j * k x) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                            (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_one_mul
                              (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.to_raw_eq
                                (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isInt_mul (Eq.refl HMul.hMul)
                                  (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.of_raw ℝ (Int.negOfNat 1))
                                  (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.to_isInt
                                    (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.of_raw ℝ 1))
                                  (Eq.refl (Int.negOfNat 1))))))
                          Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_zero)
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_lt (v j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1)
                          (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_zero_add
                            ((∑ x, S x j * k x) ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (Int.negOfNat 1).rawCast + 0)))))
                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_mul
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_add
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_pf_left (k i) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                          (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_pf_right (v j) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                            (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.one_mul (Nat.rawCast 1))))
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_add
                          (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_pf_left (k i) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                            (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_pf_right (∑ x, S x j * k x) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                              (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.one_mul (Int.negOfNat 1).rawCast)))
                          (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_zero (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1))
                          (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_zero
                            (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 *
                                ((∑ x, S x j * k x) ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (Int.negOfNat 1).rawCast) +
                              0)))
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_lt
                          (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (v j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1))
                          (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_zero_add
                            (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 *
                                ((∑ x, S x j * k x) ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (Int.negOfNat 1).rawCast) +
                              0))))
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.zero_mul
                        (v j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1 +
                          ((∑ x, S x j * k x) ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (Int.negOfNat 1).rawCast + 0)))
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_zero
                        (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (v j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1) +
                          (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 *
                              ((∑ x, S x j * k x) ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (Int.negOfNat 1).rawCast) +
                            0)))))
                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_lt (S i j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1)
                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_zero_add
                      (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (v j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1) +
                        (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 *
                            ((∑ x, S x j * k x) ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (Int.negOfNat 1).rawCast) +
                          0)))))
                (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.atom_pf (q i))
                (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_mul
                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_add
                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_pf_left (S i j) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_pf_right (q i) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.one_mul (Nat.rawCast 1))))
                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_zero (S i j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1))
                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_zero

                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_mul
                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_add

                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_pf_left (v j) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                          (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_pf_right (q i) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                            (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.one_mul (Nat.rawCast 1)))))
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_zero
                        (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (v j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1)))
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_zero
                        (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 *
                            (v j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (q i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1)) +
                          0)))
                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_mul

                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.zero_mul (q i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1 + 0))
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_zero
                        (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (q i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1) + 0))))
                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.sub_congr (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.atom_pf (v j))
                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.atom_pf (∑ x, S x j * k x))
                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.sub_pf
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_add
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_mul (∑ x, S x j * k x) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                          (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_one_mul
                            (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.to_raw_eq
                              (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isInt_mul (Eq.refl HMul.hMul)
                                (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.of_raw ℝ (Int.negOfNat 1))
                                (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.to_isInt
                                  (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.of_raw ℝ 1))
                                (Eq.refl (Int.negOfNat 1))))))
                        Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_zero)
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_lt (v j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1)
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_zero_add
                          ((∑ x, S x j * k x) ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (Int.negOfNat 1).rawCast + 0)))))
                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_mul
                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_add
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_pf_left (k i) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_pf_right (v j) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                          (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_pf_left (q i) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                            (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.one_mul (Nat.rawCast 1)))))
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_add
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_pf_left (k i) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                          (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_pf_right (∑ x, S x j * k x) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                            (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_pf_left (q i) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                              (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.one_mul (Int.negOfNat 1).rawCast))))
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_zero
                          (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (q i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1)))
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_zero
                          (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 *
                              ((∑ x, S x j * k x) ^ Nat.rawCast 1 *
                                (q i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (Int.negOfNat 1).rawCast)) +
                            0)))
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_lt
                        (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 *
                          (v j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (q i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1)))
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_zero_add
                          (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 *
                              ((∑ x, S x j * k x) ^ Nat.rawCast 1 *
                                (q i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (Int.negOfNat 1).rawCast)) +
                            0))))
                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.zero_mul
                      (v j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1 +
                        ((∑ x, S x j * k x) ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (Int.negOfNat 1).rawCast + 0)))
                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_zero
                      (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 *
                          (v j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (q i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1)) +
                        (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 *
                            ((∑ x, S x j * k x) ^ Nat.rawCast 1 *
                              (q i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (Int.negOfNat 1).rawCast)) +
                          0)))))
                (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_lt
                  (S i j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (q i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1))
                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_zero_add
                    (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 *
                        (v j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (q i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1)) +
                      (k i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 *
                          ((∑ x, S x j * k x) ^ Nat.rawCast 1 *
                            (q i ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (Int.negOfNat 1).rawCast)) +
                        0))))))
          (Eq.mpr
            (id
              (congrArg
                (fun _a => _a = ∑ x, S x j * q x + ∑ x, k x * q x * (v j - ∑ x, S x j * k x))
                Finset.sum_add_distrib))
            (Eq.refl (∑ x, S x j * q x + ∑ x, k x * q x * (v j - ∑ x, S x j * k x)))))
        (Eq.mpr
          (id
            (congrArg
              (fun _a =>
                ∑ x, S x j * q x + ∑ x, k x * q x * (v j - ∑ x, S x j * k x) =
                  ∑ x, S x j * q x + _a)
              (Finset.sum_mul Finset.univ (fun i => k i * q i) (v j - ∑ x, S x j * k x))))
          (Eq.refl (∑ x, S x j * q x + ∑ x, k x * q x * (v j - ∑ x, S x j * k x)))))

theorems.source_text:
/-- Raw outer-product write changes a query in proportion to key overlap, but it
does not subtract existing retrieved content. -/
theorem read_rawOuterWrite
    (S : Memory K V) (k q : KeyVec K) (v : ValueVec V) :
    read (rawOuterWrite S k v) q =
      read S q + fun j => keyDot k q * v j := by
  rw [rawOuterWrite, read_add, read_outerKV]
theorems.signature:
∀ {K V : ℕ} (S : OnlineMemory.Memory K V) (k q : OnlineMemory.KeyVec K)
  (v : OnlineMemory.ValueVec V),
  OnlineMemory.read (OnlineMemory.rawOuterWrite S k v) q =
    OnlineMemory.read S q + fun j => OnlineMemory.keyDot k q * v j
theorems.proof_body:
fun {K V} S k q v =>
  Eq.mpr
    (id
      (congrArg
        (fun _a =>
          OnlineMemory.read _a q = OnlineMemory.read S q + fun j => OnlineMemory.keyDot k q * v j)
        (OnlineMemory.rawOuterWrite.eq_1 S k v)))
    (Eq.mpr
      (id
        (congrArg (fun _a => _a = OnlineMemory.read S q + fun j => OnlineMemory.keyDot k q * v j)
          (OnlineMemory.read_add S (M2RNNComparison.outerKV k v) q)))
      (Eq.mpr
        (id
          (congrArg
            (fun _a =>
              OnlineMemory.read S q + _a =
                OnlineMemory.read S q + fun j => OnlineMemory.keyDot k q * v j)
            (OnlineMemory.read_outerKV k q v)))
        (Eq.refl (OnlineMemory.read S q + fun j => OnlineMemory.keyDot k q * v j))))

theorems.source_text:
/-- With a unit key, raw writing reads back "old content plus new value". -/
theorem rawOuterWrite_reads_existing_plus_value_unit
    (S : Memory K V) (k : KeyVec K) (v : ValueVec V)
    (hk : keyDot k k = 1) :
    read (rawOuterWrite S k v) k = read S k + v := by
  rw [read_rawOuterWrite]
  ext j
  simp [hk]
theorems.signature:
∀ {K V : ℕ} (S : OnlineMemory.Memory K V) (k : OnlineMemory.KeyVec K) (v : OnlineMemory.ValueVec V),
  OnlineMemory.keyDot k k = 1 →
    OnlineMemory.read (OnlineMemory.rawOuterWrite S k v) k = OnlineMemory.read S k + v
theorems.proof_body:
fun {K V} S k v hk =>
  Eq.mpr
    (id
      (congrArg (fun _a => _a = OnlineMemory.read S k + v)
        (OnlineMemory.read_rawOuterWrite S k k v)))
    (funext fun j =>
      of_eq_true
        (Eq.trans
          (congrArg (fun x => (OnlineMemory.read S k + x) j = OnlineMemory.read S k j + v j)
            (funext fun j => Eq.trans (congrArg (fun x => x * v j) hk) (one_mul (v j))))
          (eq_self (OnlineMemory.read S k j + v j))))

theorems.doc: With a unit key, raw writing reads back "old content plus new value".

/-- A raw outer-product write cannot be an exact overwrite when the addressed
slot already contains nonzero content. -/
theorem rawOuterWrite_not_exact_overwrite_with_existing_content
    (S : Memory K V) (k : KeyVec K) (v : ValueVec V)
    (hk : keyDot k k = 1) (j : Fin V)
    (hprev : read S k j ≠ 0) :
    read (rawOuterWrite S k v) k ≠ v := by
  intro h
  rw [rawOuterWrite_reads_existing_plus_value_unit S k v hk] at h
  have hj := congrFun h j
  change read S k j + v j = v j at hj
  have hz : read S k j = 0 := by
    linarith
  exact hprev hz
theorems.signature:
∀ {K V : ℕ} (S : OnlineMemory.Memory K V) (k : OnlineMemory.KeyVec K) (v : OnlineMemory.ValueVec V),
  OnlineMemory.keyDot k k = 1 →
    ∀ (j : Fin V),
      OnlineMemory.read S k j ≠ 0 → OnlineMemory.read (OnlineMemory.rawOuterWrite S k v) k ≠ v
theorems.proof_body:
fun {K V} S k v hk j hprev h =>
  have hj :=
    congrFun
      (Eq.mp
        (congrArg (fun _a => _a = v)
          (OnlineMemory.rawOuterWrite_reads_existing_plus_value_unit S k v hk))
        h)
      j;
  id
    (fun hj =>
      have hz :=
        Mathlib.Tactic.Linarith.eq_of_not_lt_of_not_gt (OnlineMemory.read S k j) 0
          (Not.intro fun a =>
            Mathlib.Tactic.Linarith.lt_irrefl
              (Eq.mp
                (congrArg (fun _a => _a < 0)
                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.of_eq
                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_congr
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_congr
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.sub_congr
                          (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_congr
                            (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.atom_pf (OnlineMemory.read S k j))
                            (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.atom_pf (v j))
                            (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_lt
                              (OnlineMemory.read S k j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1)
                              (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_zero_add
                                (v j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1 + 0))))
                          (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.atom_pf (v j))
                          (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.sub_pf
                            (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_add
                              (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_mul (v j) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                                (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_one_mul
                                  (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.to_raw_eq
                                    (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isInt_mul (Eq.refl HMul.hMul)
                                      (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.of_raw ℝ (Int.negOfNat 1))
                                      (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.to_isInt
                                        (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.of_raw ℝ 1))
                                      (Eq.refl (Int.negOfNat 1))))))
                              Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_zero)
                            (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_lt
                              (OnlineMemory.read S k j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1)
                              (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_overlap_zero
                                (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_overlap_pf_zero (v j) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                                  (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.to_isNat
                                    (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isInt_add (Eq.refl HAdd.hAdd)
                                      (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.to_isInt
                                        (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.of_raw ℝ 1))
                                      (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.of_raw ℝ (Int.negOfNat 1))
                                      (Eq.refl (Int.ofNat 0)))))
                                (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_zero_add 0)))))
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_add
                          (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_mul (OnlineMemory.read S k j) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                            (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_one_mul
                              (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.to_raw_eq
                                (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isInt_mul (Eq.refl HMul.hMul)
                                  (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.of_raw ℝ (Int.negOfNat 1))
                                  (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.to_isInt
                                    (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.of_raw ℝ 1))
                                  (Eq.refl (Int.negOfNat 1))))))
                          Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_zero))
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.sub_congr
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.atom_pf (OnlineMemory.read S k j))
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.cast_zero
                          (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isNat_ofNat ℝ Nat.cast_zero))
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.sub_pf Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_zero
                          (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_zero
                            (OnlineMemory.read S k j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1 + 0))))
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_overlap_zero
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_overlap_pf_zero (OnlineMemory.read S k j)
                          (Nat.rawCast 1)
                          (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.to_isNat
                            (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isInt_add (Eq.refl HAdd.hAdd)
                              (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.of_raw ℝ (Int.negOfNat 1))
                              (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.to_isInt
                                (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.of_raw ℝ 1))
                              (Eq.refl (Int.ofNat 0)))))
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_zero_add 0)))
                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.cast_zero
                      (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isNat_ofNat ℝ Nat.cast_zero))))
                (Mathlib.Tactic.Linarith.lt_of_eq_of_lt (neg_eq_zero.mpr (sub_eq_zero_of_eq hj))
                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Linarith.sub_neg_of_lt a))))
          (Not.intro fun a =>
            Mathlib.Tactic.Linarith.lt_irrefl
              (Eq.mp
                (congrArg (fun _a => _a < 0)
                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.of_eq
                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_congr
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.sub_congr
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_congr
                          (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.atom_pf (OnlineMemory.read S k j))
                          (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.atom_pf (v j))
                          (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_lt
                            (OnlineMemory.read S k j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1)
                            (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_zero_add
                              (v j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1 + 0))))
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.atom_pf (v j))
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.sub_pf
                          (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_add
                            (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_mul (v j) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                              (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_one_mul
                                (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.to_raw_eq
                                  (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isInt_mul (Eq.refl HMul.hMul)
                                    (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.of_raw ℝ (Int.negOfNat 1))
                                    (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.to_isInt
                                      (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.of_raw ℝ 1))
                                    (Eq.refl (Int.negOfNat 1))))))
                            Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_zero)
                          (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_lt
                            (OnlineMemory.read S k j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1)
                            (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_overlap_zero
                              (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_overlap_pf_zero (v j) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                                (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.to_isNat
                                  (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isInt_add (Eq.refl HAdd.hAdd)
                                    (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.to_isInt
                                      (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.of_raw ℝ 1))
                                    (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.of_raw ℝ (Int.negOfNat 1))
                                    (Eq.refl (Int.ofNat 0)))))
                              (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_zero_add 0)))))
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.sub_congr
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.cast_zero
                          (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isNat_ofNat ℝ Nat.cast_zero))
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.atom_pf (OnlineMemory.read S k j))
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.sub_pf
                          (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_add
                            (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_mul (OnlineMemory.read S k j) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                              (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_one_mul
                                (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.to_raw_eq
                                  (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isInt_mul (Eq.refl HMul.hMul)
                                    (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.of_raw ℝ (Int.negOfNat 1))
                                    (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.to_isInt
                                      (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.of_raw ℝ 1))
                                    (Eq.refl (Int.negOfNat 1))))))
                            Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_zero)
                          (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_zero_add
                            (OnlineMemory.read S k j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (Int.negOfNat 1).rawCast +
                              0))))
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_overlap_zero
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_overlap_pf_zero (OnlineMemory.read S k j)
                          (Nat.rawCast 1)
                          (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.to_isNat
                            (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isInt_add (Eq.refl HAdd.hAdd)
                              (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.to_isInt
                                (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.of_raw ℝ 1))
                              (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.of_raw ℝ (Int.negOfNat 1))
                              (Eq.refl (Int.ofNat 0)))))
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_zero_add 0)))
                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.cast_zero
                      (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isNat_ofNat ℝ Nat.cast_zero))))
                (Mathlib.Tactic.Linarith.lt_of_eq_of_lt (sub_eq_zero_of_eq hj)
                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Linarith.sub_neg_of_lt a))));
      hprev hz)
    hj
theorems.name: OnlineMemory.rawOuterWrite_not_exact_overwrite_with_existing_content
theorems.doc:
A raw outer-product write cannot be an exact overwrite when the addressed
slot already contains nonzero content.

theorems.source_text:
/-- More generally, no state-independent additive write can overwrite two old
memories that disagree at the addressed key in one step.

This is the resource-separation hook: to implement overwrite uniformly, the
write term must either depend on the old state, add extra machinery, or use
additional steps/resources to infer and cancel the old content. -/
theorem stateIndependentAdditiveWrite_cannot_exact_overwrite_two_memories
    (term : KeyVec K → ValueVec V → Memory K V)
    (S₁ S₂ : Memory K V) (k : KeyVec K) (v : ValueVec V) (j : Fin V)
    (hread : read S₁ k j ≠ read S₂ k j) :
    ¬ (read (stateIndependentAdditiveWrite term S₁ k v) k = v ∧
       read (stateIndependentAdditiveWrite term S₂ k v) k = v) := by
  intro h
  simp [stateIndependentAdditiveWrite, read_add] at h
  have h₁ := congrFun h.1 j
  have h₂ := congrFun h.2 j
  change read S₁ k j + read (term k v) k j = v j at h₁
  change read S₂ k j + read (term k v) k j = v j at h₂
  have heq : read S₁ k j = read S₂ k j := by
    linarith
  exact hread heq
theorems.signature:
∀ {K V : ℕ} (term : OnlineMemory.KeyVec K → OnlineMemory.ValueVec V → OnlineMemory.Memory K V)
  (S₁ S₂ : OnlineMemory.Memory K V) (k : OnlineMemory.KeyVec K) (v : OnlineMemory.ValueVec V)
  (j : Fin V),
  OnlineMemory.read S₁ k j ≠ OnlineMemory.read S₂ k j →
    ¬(OnlineMemory.read (OnlineMemory.stateIndependentAdditiveWrite term S₁ k v) k = v ∧
        OnlineMemory.read (OnlineMemory.stateIndependentAdditiveWrite term S₂ k v) k = v)
theorems.proof_body:
fun {K V} term S₁ S₂ k v j hread h =>
  have h₁ :=
    congrFun
      (Eq.mp
          (congr (congrArg (fun x => And (x = v)) (OnlineMemory.read_add S₁ (term k v) k))
            (congrArg (fun x => x = v) (OnlineMemory.read_add S₂ (term k v) k)))
          h).left
      j;
  have h₂ :=
    congrFun
      (Eq.mp
          (congr (congrArg (fun x => And (x = v)) (OnlineMemory.read_add S₁ (term k v) k))
            (congrArg (fun x => x = v) (OnlineMemory.read_add S₂ (term k v) k)))
          h).right
      j;
  id
    (fun h₁ =>
      id
        (fun h₂ =>
          have heq :=
            Mathlib.Tactic.Linarith.eq_of_not_lt_of_not_gt (OnlineMemory.read S₁ k j)
              (OnlineMemory.read S₂ k j)
              (Not.intro fun a =>
                Mathlib.Tactic.Linarith.lt_irrefl
                  (Eq.mp
                    (congrArg (fun _a => _a < 0)
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.of_eq
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_congr
                          (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_congr
                            (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_congr
                              (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.sub_congr
                                (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_congr
                                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.atom_pf (OnlineMemory.read S₁ k j))
                                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.atom_pf (OnlineMemory.read (term k v) k j))
                                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_lt
                                    (OnlineMemory.read S₁ k j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1)
                                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_zero_add
                                      (OnlineMemory.read (term k v) k j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 *
                                          Nat.rawCast 1 +
                                        0))))
                                (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.atom_pf (v j))
                                (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.sub_pf
                                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_add
                                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_mul (v j) (Nat.rawCast 1)
                                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_one_mul
                                        (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.to_raw_eq
                                          (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isInt_mul (Eq.refl HMul.hMul)
                                            (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.of_raw ℝ (Int.negOfNat 1))
                                            (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.to_isInt
                                              (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.of_raw ℝ 1))
                                            (Eq.refl (Int.negOfNat 1))))))
                                    Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_zero)
                                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_lt
                                    (OnlineMemory.read S₁ k j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1)
                                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_lt
                                      (OnlineMemory.read (term k v) k j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 *
                                        Nat.rawCast 1)
                                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_zero_add
                                        (v j ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * (Int.negOfNat 1).rawCast + 0))))))
                              (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_add
                                (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_mul (OnlineMemory.read S₁ k j)
                                  (Nat.rawCast 1)
                                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_one_mul
                                    (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.to_raw_eq
                                      (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isInt_mul (Eq.refl HMul.hMul)
                                        (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.of_raw ℝ (Int.negOfNat 1))
                                        (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.to_isInt
                                          (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.of_raw ℝ 1))
                                        (Eq.refl (Int.negOfNat 1))))))
                                (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_add
                                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_mul (OnlineMemory.read (term k v) k j)
                                    (Nat.rawCast 1)
