theorems.name: RecurrentResourceFormalism.no_fixed_m2rnn_update_with_key_scalar_forget_matches_e88_two_basis_keys
theorems.doc:
Even if the scalar M2RNN forget gate is allowed to depend on the input key,
the fixed-transition/scalar-carry update cannot uniformly match E88/NDM on the
two basis keys.

The key point is that matching writes from an empty state forces the scalar
forget gate to be `0` for each basis key: with `H = 0`, E88 writes
`tanh(k vᵀ)`, while M2RNN writes `(1 - f(k)) tanh(k vᵀ)`. Since `tanh(1) ≠ 0`,
uniform equality forces `f(key0) = f(key1) = 0`, reducing the claim to the
candidate-path separation above.

theorems.source_text:
/-- A row-gated M2RNN external carry still cannot match E88/NDM's mixed-key
delta correction.

The witness fixes `k = (1, 1)`, `v = 0`, and a state whose first row is zero
but second row is nonzero. A fixed right transition `H W` is row-local: the
first output row depends only on the first input row, so the row-gated M2RNN
entry `(0,0)` is zero. E88's `(I - k kᵀ) H` subtracts the second row from the
first row, so the same entry is `tanh(-1)`. -/
theorem row_forget_m2rnn_fails_mixed_key_delta_correction
    (W : TwoMat) (r : TwoVec) :
    m2rnnRowForgetUpdate2 W r lowerLeftState mixedKey (0 : TwoVec) ≠
      M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1 lowerLeftState mixedKey (0 : TwoVec) := by
  intro h
  have hentry := congrArg (fun M : TwoMat => M 0 0) h
  have hbad : Real.tanh (1 : Real) = 0 := by
    simpa [m2rnnRowForgetUpdate2, rowForgetCarry2, M2RNNComparison.m2rnnCandidate,
      M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded, M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaTransition,
      M2RNNComparison.matrixTanh, M2RNNComparison.matrixMap,
      M2RNNComparison.outerKV, lowerLeftState, mixedKey, Matrix.mul_apply] using hentry
  exact tanh_one_ne_zero hbad
theorems.signature:
∀ (W : RecurrentResourceFormalism.TwoMat) (r : RecurrentResourceFormalism.TwoVec),
  RecurrentResourceFormalism.m2rnnRowForgetUpdate2 W r RecurrentResourceFormalism.lowerLeftState
      RecurrentResourceFormalism.mixedKey 0 ≠
    M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1 RecurrentResourceFormalism.lowerLeftState
      RecurrentResourceFormalism.mixedKey 0
theorems.proof_body:
fun W r h =>
  have hentry := congrArg (fun M => M 0 0) h;
  have hbad :=
    Eq.mp
      (Eq.trans
        (congr
          (congrArg Eq
            (Eq.trans
              (congrArg (fun x => Matrix.of x 0 0)
                (funext fun i =>
                  funext fun j =>
                    congr
                      (congrArg HAdd.hAdd
                        (Eq.trans (mul_ite (i = 1) (r i) (if j = 0 then 1 else 0) 0)
                          (ite_congr (Eq.refl (i = 1))
                            (fun a =>
                              Eq.trans (mul_ite (j = 0) (r i) 1 0)
                                (ite_congr (Eq.refl (j = 0)) (fun a => mul_one (r i)) fun a =>
                                  mul_zero (r i)))
                            fun a => mul_zero (r i))))
                      (congrArg (fun x => (1 - r i) * Matrix.of x i j)
                        (funext fun i =>
                          funext fun j =>
                            congrArg Real.tanh
                              (Eq.trans
                                (congrArg
                                  (fun x =>
                                    ((Matrix.of fun i j =>
                                            if i = 1 then if j = 0 then 1 else 0 else 0) *
                                          W +
                                        Matrix.of x)
                                      i j)
                                  (funext fun i => funext fun j => mul_zero 1))
                                (Eq.trans
                                  (congrArg (fun x => x + 0)
                                    (Eq.trans
                                      (Eq.trans
                                        (Finset.sum_congr (Eq.refl Finset.univ) fun x a =>
                                          Eq.trans
                                            (ite_mul (i = 1) (if x = 0 then 1 else 0) 0 (W x j))
                                            (ite_congr (Eq.refl (i = 1))
                                              (fun a =>
                                                Eq.trans (ite_mul (x = 0) 1 0 (W x j))
                                                  (ite_congr (Eq.refl (x = 0))
                                                    (fun a => one_mul (W x j)) fun a =>
                                                    zero_mul (W x j)))
                                              fun a => zero_mul (W x j)))
                                        (Finset.sum_ite_irrel (i = 1) Finset.univ
                                          (fun x => if x = 0 then W x j else 0) fun x => 0))
                                      (ite_congr (Eq.refl (i = 1))
                                        (fun a =>
                                          Eq.trans (Finset.sum_ite_eq' Finset.univ 0 fun x => W x j)
                                            (ite_cond_eq_true (W 0 j) 0
                                              (Finset.mem_univ._simp_1 0)))
                                        fun a => Finset.sum_const_zero)))
                                  (add_zero (if i = 1 then W 0 j else 0))))))))
              (Eq.trans
                (congr
                  (congrArg HAdd.hAdd
                    (ite_cond_eq_false (if 0 = 0 then r 0 else 0) 0 zero_ne_one._simp_1))
                  (Eq.trans
                    (congrArg (HMul.hMul (1 - r 0))
                      (Eq.trans
                        (congrArg Real.tanh (ite_cond_eq_false (W 0 0) 0 zero_ne_one._simp_1))
                        Real.tanh_zero))
                    (mul_zero (1 - r 0))))
                (add_zero 0))))
          (Eq.trans
            (congrArg (fun x => Matrix.of x 0 0)
              (funext fun i =>
                funext fun j =>
                  congrArg Real.tanh
                    (Eq.trans
                      (congrArg (fun x => x i j)
                        (congr
                          (congrArg
                            (fun x =>
                              HAdd.hAdd
                                (x *
                                  Matrix.of fun i j => if i = 1 then if j = 0 then 1 else 0 else 0))
                            (congr (congrArg HSub.hSub (one_smul ℝ 1))
                              (congrArg (⇑Matrix.of) (funext fun i => funext fun j => mul_one 1))))
                          (congrArg (⇑Matrix.of) (funext fun i => funext fun j => mul_zero 1))))
                      (Eq.trans
                        (congrArg (fun x => x + 0)
                          (Eq.trans
                            (Eq.trans
                              (Finset.sum_congr (Eq.refl Finset.univ) fun x a =>
                                Eq.trans (mul_ite (x = 1) (1 i x - 1) (if j = 0 then 1 else 0) 0)
                                  (ite_congr (Eq.refl (x = 1))
                                    (fun a =>
                                      Eq.trans (mul_ite (j = 0) (1 i x - 1) 1 0)
                                        (ite_congr (Eq.refl (j = 0)) (fun a => mul_one (1 i x - 1))
                                          fun a => mul_zero (1 i x - 1)))
                                    fun a => mul_zero (1 i x - 1)))
                              (Finset.sum_ite_eq' Finset.univ 1 fun x =>
                                if j = 0 then 1 i x - 1 else 0))
                            (ite_cond_eq_true (if j = 0 then 1 i 1 - 1 else 0) 0
                              (Finset.mem_univ._simp_1 1))))
                        (add_zero (if j = 0 then 1 i 1 - 1 else 0))))))
            (Eq.trans
              (congrArg Real.tanh
                (Eq.trans (ite_cond_eq_true (1 0 1 - 1) 0 (eq_self 0))
                  (Eq.trans
                    (congrArg (fun x => x - 1)
                      (Matrix.one_apply_ne
                        (of_eq_true
                          (Eq.trans (congrArg Not zero_ne_one._simp_1) not_false_eq_true))))
                    (zero_sub 1))))
              (Real.tanh_neg 1))))
        one_eq_inv._simp_4)
      hentry;
  RecurrentResourceFormalism.tanh_one_ne_zero hbad
theorems.name: RecurrentResourceFormalism.row_forget_m2rnn_fails_mixed_key_delta_correction
theorems.doc:
A row-gated M2RNN external carry still cannot match E88/NDM's mixed-key
delta correction.

The witness fixes `k = (1, 1)`, `v = 0`, and a state whose first row is zero
but second row is nonzero. A fixed right transition `H W` is row-local: the
first output row depends only on the first input row, so the row-gated M2RNN
entry `(0,0)` is zero. E88's `(I - k kᵀ) H` subtracts the second row from the
first row, so the same entry is `tanh(-1)`.

theorems.source_text:
/-- A column-gated M2RNN external carry still cannot match E88/NDM's mixed-key
delta correction, for the same row-locality reason as the row-gated case. -/
theorem column_forget_m2rnn_fails_mixed_key_delta_correction
    (W : TwoMat) (c : TwoVec) :
    m2rnnColumnForgetUpdate2 W c lowerLeftState mixedKey (0 : TwoVec) ≠
      M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1 lowerLeftState mixedKey (0 : TwoVec) := by
  intro h
  have hentry := congrArg (fun M : TwoMat => M 0 0) h
  have hbad : Real.tanh (1 : Real) = 0 := by
    simpa [m2rnnColumnForgetUpdate2, columnForgetCarry2, M2RNNComparison.m2rnnCandidate,
      M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded, M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaTransition,
      M2RNNComparison.matrixTanh, M2RNNComparison.matrixMap,
      M2RNNComparison.outerKV, lowerLeftState, mixedKey, Matrix.mul_apply] using hentry
  exact tanh_one_ne_zero hbad
theorems.signature:
∀ (W : RecurrentResourceFormalism.TwoMat) (c : RecurrentResourceFormalism.TwoVec),
  RecurrentResourceFormalism.m2rnnColumnForgetUpdate2 W c RecurrentResourceFormalism.lowerLeftState
      RecurrentResourceFormalism.mixedKey 0 ≠
    M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1 RecurrentResourceFormalism.lowerLeftState
      RecurrentResourceFormalism.mixedKey 0
theorems.proof_body:
fun W c h =>
  have hentry := congrArg (fun M => M 0 0) h;
  have hbad :=
    Eq.mp
      (Eq.trans
        (congr
          (congrArg Eq
            (Eq.trans
              (congrArg (fun x => Matrix.of x 0 0)
                (funext fun i =>
                  funext fun j =>
                    congr
                      (congrArg HAdd.hAdd
                        (Eq.trans (mul_ite (i = 1) (c j) (if j = 0 then 1 else 0) 0)
                          (ite_congr (Eq.refl (i = 1))
                            (fun a =>
                              Eq.trans (mul_ite (j = 0) (c j) 1 0)
                                (ite_congr (Eq.refl (j = 0)) (fun a => mul_one (c j)) fun a =>
                                  mul_zero (c j)))
                            fun a => mul_zero (c j))))
                      (congrArg (fun x => (1 - c j) * Matrix.of x i j)
                        (funext fun i =>
                          funext fun j =>
                            congrArg Real.tanh
                              (Eq.trans
                                (congrArg
                                  (fun x =>
                                    ((Matrix.of fun i j =>
                                            if i = 1 then if j = 0 then 1 else 0 else 0) *
                                          W +
                                        Matrix.of x)
                                      i j)
                                  (funext fun i => funext fun j => mul_zero 1))
                                (Eq.trans
                                  (congrArg (fun x => x + 0)
                                    (Eq.trans
                                      (Eq.trans
                                        (Finset.sum_congr (Eq.refl Finset.univ) fun x a =>
                                          Eq.trans
                                            (ite_mul (i = 1) (if x = 0 then 1 else 0) 0 (W x j))
                                            (ite_congr (Eq.refl (i = 1))
                                              (fun a =>
                                                Eq.trans (ite_mul (x = 0) 1 0 (W x j))
                                                  (ite_congr (Eq.refl (x = 0))
                                                    (fun a => one_mul (W x j)) fun a =>
                                                    zero_mul (W x j)))
                                              fun a => zero_mul (W x j)))
                                        (Finset.sum_ite_irrel (i = 1) Finset.univ
                                          (fun x => if x = 0 then W x j else 0) fun x => 0))
                                      (ite_congr (Eq.refl (i = 1))
                                        (fun a =>
                                          Eq.trans (Finset.sum_ite_eq' Finset.univ 0 fun x => W x j)
                                            (ite_cond_eq_true (W 0 j) 0
                                              (Finset.mem_univ._simp_1 0)))
                                        fun a => Finset.sum_const_zero)))
                                  (add_zero (if i = 1 then W 0 j else 0))))))))
              (Eq.trans
                (congr
                  (congrArg HAdd.hAdd
                    (ite_cond_eq_false (if 0 = 0 then c 0 else 0) 0 zero_ne_one._simp_1))
                  (Eq.trans
                    (congrArg (HMul.hMul (1 - c 0))
                      (Eq.trans
                        (congrArg Real.tanh (ite_cond_eq_false (W 0 0) 0 zero_ne_one._simp_1))
                        Real.tanh_zero))
                    (mul_zero (1 - c 0))))
                (add_zero 0))))
          (Eq.trans
            (congrArg (fun x => Matrix.of x 0 0)
              (funext fun i =>
                funext fun j =>
                  congrArg Real.tanh
                    (Eq.trans
                      (congrArg (fun x => x i j)
                        (congr
                          (congrArg
                            (fun x =>
                              HAdd.hAdd
                                (x *
                                  Matrix.of fun i j => if i = 1 then if j = 0 then 1 else 0 else 0))
                            (congr (congrArg HSub.hSub (one_smul ℝ 1))
                              (congrArg (⇑Matrix.of) (funext fun i => funext fun j => mul_one 1))))
                          (congrArg (⇑Matrix.of) (funext fun i => funext fun j => mul_zero 1))))
                      (Eq.trans
                        (congrArg (fun x => x + 0)
                          (Eq.trans
                            (Eq.trans
                              (Finset.sum_congr (Eq.refl Finset.univ) fun x a =>
                                Eq.trans (mul_ite (x = 1) (1 i x - 1) (if j = 0 then 1 else 0) 0)
                                  (ite_congr (Eq.refl (x = 1))
                                    (fun a =>
                                      Eq.trans (mul_ite (j = 0) (1 i x - 1) 1 0)
                                        (ite_congr (Eq.refl (j = 0)) (fun a => mul_one (1 i x - 1))
                                          fun a => mul_zero (1 i x - 1)))
                                    fun a => mul_zero (1 i x - 1)))
                              (Finset.sum_ite_eq' Finset.univ 1 fun x =>
                                if j = 0 then 1 i x - 1 else 0))
                            (ite_cond_eq_true (if j = 0 then 1 i 1 - 1 else 0) 0
                              (Finset.mem_univ._simp_1 1))))
                        (add_zero (if j = 0 then 1 i 1 - 1 else 0))))))
            (Eq.trans
              (congrArg Real.tanh
                (Eq.trans (ite_cond_eq_true (1 0 1 - 1) 0 (eq_self 0))
                  (Eq.trans
                    (congrArg (fun x => x - 1)
                      (Matrix.one_apply_ne
                        (of_eq_true
                          (Eq.trans (congrArg Not zero_ne_one._simp_1) not_false_eq_true))))
                    (zero_sub 1))))
              (Real.tanh_neg 1))))
        one_eq_inv._simp_4)
      hentry;
  RecurrentResourceFormalism.tanh_one_ne_zero hbad
theorems.name: RecurrentResourceFormalism.column_forget_m2rnn_fails_mixed_key_delta_correction
theorems.doc:
A column-gated M2RNN external carry still cannot match E88/NDM's mixed-key
delta correction, for the same row-locality reason as the row-gated case.

theorems.source_text:
/-- Even cellwise external carry cannot repair the missing mixed-key delta
correction if the candidate path remains a fixed right transition plus raw
outer-product write. Cell gates can retain or replace cells, but they do not
create the cross-row term `-k kᵀ H` that E88/NDM applies before `tanh`. -/
theorem cell_forget_m2rnn_fails_mixed_key_delta_correction
    (W : TwoMat) (g : TwoMat) :
    m2rnnCellForgetUpdate2 W g lowerLeftState mixedKey (0 : TwoVec) ≠
      M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1 lowerLeftState mixedKey (0 : TwoVec) := by
  intro h
  have hentry := congrArg (fun M : TwoMat => M 0 0) h
  have hbad : Real.tanh (1 : Real) = 0 := by
    simpa [m2rnnCellForgetUpdate2, cellForgetCarry2, M2RNNComparison.m2rnnCandidate,
      M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded, M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaTransition,
      M2RNNComparison.matrixTanh, M2RNNComparison.matrixMap,
      M2RNNComparison.outerKV, lowerLeftState, mixedKey, Matrix.mul_apply] using hentry
  exact tanh_one_ne_zero hbad
theorems.signature:
∀ (W g : RecurrentResourceFormalism.TwoMat),
  RecurrentResourceFormalism.m2rnnCellForgetUpdate2 W g RecurrentResourceFormalism.lowerLeftState
      RecurrentResourceFormalism.mixedKey 0 ≠
    M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1 RecurrentResourceFormalism.lowerLeftState
      RecurrentResourceFormalism.mixedKey 0
theorems.proof_body:
fun W g h =>
  have hentry := congrArg (fun M => M 0 0) h;
  have hbad :=
    Eq.mp
      (Eq.trans
        (congr
          (congrArg Eq
            (Eq.trans
              (congrArg (fun x => Matrix.of x 0 0)
                (funext fun i =>
                  funext fun j =>
                    congr
                      (congrArg HAdd.hAdd
                        (Eq.trans (mul_ite (i = 1) (g i j) (if j = 0 then 1 else 0) 0)
                          (ite_congr (Eq.refl (i = 1))
                            (fun a =>
                              Eq.trans (mul_ite (j = 0) (g i j) 1 0)
                                (ite_congr (Eq.refl (j = 0)) (fun a => mul_one (g i j)) fun a =>
                                  mul_zero (g i j)))
                            fun a => mul_zero (g i j))))
                      (congrArg (fun x => (1 - g i j) * Matrix.of x i j)
                        (funext fun i =>
                          funext fun j =>
                            congrArg Real.tanh
                              (Eq.trans
                                (congrArg
                                  (fun x =>
                                    ((Matrix.of fun i j =>
                                            if i = 1 then if j = 0 then 1 else 0 else 0) *
                                          W +
                                        Matrix.of x)
                                      i j)
                                  (funext fun i => funext fun j => mul_zero 1))
                                (Eq.trans
                                  (congrArg (fun x => x + 0)
                                    (Eq.trans
                                      (Eq.trans
                                        (Finset.sum_congr (Eq.refl Finset.univ) fun x a =>
                                          Eq.trans
                                            (ite_mul (i = 1) (if x = 0 then 1 else 0) 0 (W x j))
                                            (ite_congr (Eq.refl (i = 1))
                                              (fun a =>
                                                Eq.trans (ite_mul (x = 0) 1 0 (W x j))
                                                  (ite_congr (Eq.refl (x = 0))
                                                    (fun a => one_mul (W x j)) fun a =>
                                                    zero_mul (W x j)))
                                              fun a => zero_mul (W x j)))
                                        (Finset.sum_ite_irrel (i = 1) Finset.univ
                                          (fun x => if x = 0 then W x j else 0) fun x => 0))
                                      (ite_congr (Eq.refl (i = 1))
                                        (fun a =>
                                          Eq.trans (Finset.sum_ite_eq' Finset.univ 0 fun x => W x j)
                                            (ite_cond_eq_true (W 0 j) 0
                                              (Finset.mem_univ._simp_1 0)))
                                        fun a => Finset.sum_const_zero)))
                                  (add_zero (if i = 1 then W 0 j else 0))))))))
              (Eq.trans
                (congr
                  (congrArg HAdd.hAdd
                    (ite_cond_eq_false (if 0 = 0 then g 0 0 else 0) 0 zero_ne_one._simp_1))
                  (Eq.trans
                    (congrArg (HMul.hMul (1 - g 0 0))
                      (Eq.trans
                        (congrArg Real.tanh (ite_cond_eq_false (W 0 0) 0 zero_ne_one._simp_1))
                        Real.tanh_zero))
                    (mul_zero (1 - g 0 0))))
                (add_zero 0))))
          (Eq.trans
            (congrArg (fun x => Matrix.of x 0 0)
              (funext fun i =>
                funext fun j =>
                  congrArg Real.tanh
                    (Eq.trans
                      (congrArg (fun x => x i j)
                        (congr
                          (congrArg
                            (fun x =>
                              HAdd.hAdd
                                (x *
                                  Matrix.of fun i j => if i = 1 then if j = 0 then 1 else 0 else 0))
                            (congr (congrArg HSub.hSub (one_smul ℝ 1))
                              (congrArg (⇑Matrix.of) (funext fun i => funext fun j => mul_one 1))))
                          (congrArg (⇑Matrix.of) (funext fun i => funext fun j => mul_zero 1))))
                      (Eq.trans
                        (congrArg (fun x => x + 0)
                          (Eq.trans
                            (Eq.trans
                              (Finset.sum_congr (Eq.refl Finset.univ) fun x a =>
                                Eq.trans (mul_ite (x = 1) (1 i x - 1) (if j = 0 then 1 else 0) 0)
                                  (ite_congr (Eq.refl (x = 1))
                                    (fun a =>
                                      Eq.trans (mul_ite (j = 0) (1 i x - 1) 1 0)
                                        (ite_congr (Eq.refl (j = 0)) (fun a => mul_one (1 i x - 1))
                                          fun a => mul_zero (1 i x - 1)))
                                    fun a => mul_zero (1 i x - 1)))
                              (Finset.sum_ite_eq' Finset.univ 1 fun x =>
                                if j = 0 then 1 i x - 1 else 0))
                            (ite_cond_eq_true (if j = 0 then 1 i 1 - 1 else 0) 0
                              (Finset.mem_univ._simp_1 1))))
                        (add_zero (if j = 0 then 1 i 1 - 1 else 0))))))
            (Eq.trans
              (congrArg Real.tanh
                (Eq.trans (ite_cond_eq_true (1 0 1 - 1) 0 (eq_self 0))
                  (Eq.trans
                    (congrArg (fun x => x - 1)
                      (Matrix.one_apply_ne
                        (of_eq_true
                          (Eq.trans (congrArg Not zero_ne_one._simp_1) not_false_eq_true))))
                    (zero_sub 1))))
              (Real.tanh_neg 1))))
        one_eq_inv._simp_4)
      hentry;
  RecurrentResourceFormalism.tanh_one_ne_zero hbad
theorems.name: RecurrentResourceFormalism.cell_forget_m2rnn_fails_mixed_key_delta_correction
theorems.doc:
Even cellwise external carry cannot repair the missing mixed-key delta
correction if the candidate path remains a fixed right transition plus raw
outer-product write. Cell gates can retain or replace cells, but they do not
create the cross-row term `-k kᵀ H` that E88/NDM applies before `tanh`.

theorems.source_text:
/-- The one-step mixed-key delta-correction target.

This target isolates the operation that E88/NDM gets from its input-dependent
left transition:

`H ↦ tanh((I - k kᵀ) H + k vᵀ)`.

At the witness state/key/value below, the correction moves information across
rows. A fixed-right-transition M2RNN candidate can mix columns within each row,
but cannot create this cross-row correction in one step; external row/column/cell
forget gates can only retain or replace already-computed cells. -/
def ImplementsMixedKeyDeltaCorrection
    (update : TwoMat → TwoVec → TwoVec → TwoMat) : Prop :=
  update lowerLeftState mixedKey (0 : TwoVec) =
    M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1 lowerLeftState mixedKey (0 : TwoVec)
theorems.signature:
(RecurrentResourceFormalism.TwoMat →
    RecurrentResourceFormalism.TwoVec →
      RecurrentResourceFormalism.TwoVec → RecurrentResourceFormalism.TwoMat) →
  Prop
theorems.proof_body:
fun update =>
  update RecurrentResourceFormalism.lowerLeftState RecurrentResourceFormalism.mixedKey 0 =
    M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1 RecurrentResourceFormalism.lowerLeftState
      RecurrentResourceFormalism.mixedKey 0
theorems.name: RecurrentResourceFormalism.ImplementsMixedKeyDeltaCorrection
theorems.doc:
The one-step mixed-key delta-correction target.

This target isolates the operation that E88/NDM gets from its input-dependent
left transition:

`H ↦ tanh((I - k kᵀ) H + k vᵀ)`.

At the witness state/key/value below, the correction moves information across
rows. A fixed-right-transition M2RNN candidate can mix columns within each row,
but cannot create this cross-row correction in one step; external row/column/cell
forget gates can only retain or replace already-computed cells.

theorems.source_text:
/-- E88/NDM implements the mixed-key delta-correction target by definition. -/
theorem e88_implements_mixed_key_delta_correction :
    ImplementsMixedKeyDeltaCorrection (M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1) := by
  rfl
theorems.signature:
RecurrentResourceFormalism.ImplementsMixedKeyDeltaCorrection
  (M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1)
theorems.proof_body:
Eq.refl
  (M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1 RecurrentResourceFormalism.lowerLeftState
    RecurrentResourceFormalism.mixedKey 0)

theorems.source_text:
/-- A small resource class for M2RNN-style one-step updates with a fixed right
transition, raw outer-product candidate, and external forget carry.

The row/column/cell cases cover scalar and input-dependent variants at this
witness: once the state/key/value are fixed, any such gate has some concrete
row, column, or cell values. -/
inductive FixedRightRawExternalForget2 where
  | row (W : TwoMat) (r : TwoVec)
  | column (W : TwoMat) (c : TwoVec)
  | cell (W : TwoMat) (g : TwoMat)
theorems.signature: Type

theorems.source_text:
/-- Main one-step resource separation:

E88/NDM implements the mixed-key delta correction in one recurrent step. The
M2RNN-style resource class with fixed right transition, raw outer write, and
external row/column/cell forget carry cannot implement that same target in one
step.

This is deliberately a one-step/resource theorem, not a broad computability
separation. It identifies the extra mechanism M2RNN would need to simulate E88:
an input-dependent left transition or additional resources/steps that recreate
the missing `-k kᵀ H` correction. -/
theorem emender_m2rnn_one_step_resource_separation :
    ImplementsMixedKeyDeltaCorrection (M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1) ∧
    ∀ resource : FixedRightRawExternalForget2,
      ¬ ImplementsMixedKeyDeltaCorrection resource.update := by
  constructor
  · exact e88_implements_mixed_key_delta_correction
  · intro resource
    cases resource with
    | row W r =>
        exact row_forget_m2rnn_not_implements_mixed_key_delta_correction W r
    | column W c =>
        exact column_forget_m2rnn_not_implements_mixed_key_delta_correction W c
    | cell W g =>
        exact cell_forget_m2rnn_not_implements_mixed_key_delta_correction W g
theorems.signature:
RecurrentResourceFormalism.ImplementsMixedKeyDeltaCorrection
    (M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1) ∧
  ∀ (resource : RecurrentResourceFormalism.FixedRightRawExternalForget2),
    ¬RecurrentResourceFormalism.ImplementsMixedKeyDeltaCorrection resource.update
theorems.proof_body:
⟨RecurrentResourceFormalism.e88_implements_mixed_key_delta_correction, fun resource =>
  RecurrentResourceFormalism.FixedRightRawExternalForget2.casesOn (motive := fun t =>
    resource = t → ¬RecurrentResourceFormalism.ImplementsMixedKeyDeltaCorrection resource.update)
    resource
    (fun W r h =>
      Eq.symm h ▸
        RecurrentResourceFormalism.row_forget_m2rnn_not_implements_mixed_key_delta_correction W r)
    (fun W c h =>
      Eq.symm h ▸
        RecurrentResourceFormalism.column_forget_m2rnn_not_implements_mixed_key_delta_correction W
          c)
    (fun W g h =>
      Eq.symm h ▸
        RecurrentResourceFormalism.cell_forget_m2rnn_not_implements_mixed_key_delta_correction W g)
    (Eq.refl resource)⟩
theorems.name: RecurrentResourceFormalism.emender_m2rnn_one_step_resource_separation
theorems.doc:
Main one-step resource separation:

E88/NDM implements the mixed-key delta correction in one recurrent step. The
M2RNN-style resource class with fixed right transition, raw outer write, and
external row/column/cell forget carry cannot implement that same target in one
step.

This is deliberately a one-step/resource theorem, not a broad computability
separation. It identifies the extra mechanism M2RNN would need to simulate E88:
an input-dependent left transition or additional resources/steps that recreate
the missing `-k kᵀ H` correction.

/-- Row-vector external carry for arbitrary key/value dimensions. -/
def rowForgetCarryKV {K V : Nat}
    (r : M2RNNComparison.Vec K)
    (H Z : M2RNNComparison.MatState K V) : M2RNNComparison.MatState K V :=
  Matrix.of fun i j => r i * H i j + (1 - r i) * Z i j
theorems.signature:
{K V : ℕ} →
  M2RNNComparison.Vec K →
    M2RNNComparison.MatState K V → M2RNNComparison.MatState K V → M2RNNComparison.MatState K V
theorems.proof_body: fun {K V} r H Z => Matrix.of fun i j => r i * H i j + (1 - r i) * Z i j
theorems.name: RecurrentResourceFormalism.rowForgetCarryKV
theorems.doc: Row-vector external carry for arbitrary key/value dimensions.

theorems.source_text:
/-- The embedded two-direction mixed key in any key space of size at least two. -/
def embeddedMixedKey {K : Nat} (hK : 1 < K) : M2RNNComparison.Vec K :=
  fun i =>
    if i = (⟨0, Nat.lt_trans Nat.zero_lt_one hK⟩ : Fin K) then 1
    else if i = (⟨1, hK⟩ : Fin K) then 1
    else 0
theorems.signature: {K : ℕ} → 1 < K → M2RNNComparison.Vec K
theorems.proof_body: fun {K} hK i => if i = ⟨0, ⋯⟩ then 1 else if i = ⟨1, hK⟩ then 1 else 0
theorems.name: RecurrentResourceFormalism.embeddedMixedKey
theorems.doc: The embedded two-direction mixed key in any key space of size at least two.

theorems.source_text:
/-- The embedded witness state: row 0 is zero; row 1 stores one active value in
column 0; all other coordinates are zero. -/
def embeddedLowerLeftState {K V : Nat} (hK : 1 < K) (hV : 0 < V) :
    M2RNNComparison.MatState K V :=
  Matrix.of fun i j =>
    if i = (⟨1, hK⟩ : Fin K) then
      if j = (⟨0, hV⟩ : Fin V) then 1 else 0
    else 0
theorems.signature: {K V : ℕ} → 1 < K → 0 < V → M2RNNComparison.MatState K V
theorems.proof_body: fun {K V} hK hV => Matrix.of fun i j => if i = ⟨1, hK⟩ then if j = ⟨0, hV⟩ then 1 else 0 else 0
theorems.name: RecurrentResourceFormalism.embeddedLowerLeftState
theorems.doc:
The embedded witness state: row 0 is zero; row 1 stores one active value in
column 0; all other coordinates are zero.

theorems.source_text:
/-- The arbitrary-dimensional mixed-key delta-correction target. It is the same
2D obstruction embedded into any `K ≥ 2, V ≥ 1` state space. -/
def ImplementsEmbeddedMixedKeyDeltaCorrection {K V : Nat} (hK : 1 < K) (hV : 0 < V)
    (update :
      M2RNNComparison.MatState K V →
      M2RNNComparison.Vec K →
      M2RNNComparison.Vec V →
      M2RNNComparison.MatState K V) : Prop :=
  update (embeddedLowerLeftState hK hV) (embeddedMixedKey hK)
      (0 : M2RNNComparison.Vec V) =
    M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1
      (embeddedLowerLeftState hK hV) (embeddedMixedKey hK)
      (0 : M2RNNComparison.Vec V)
theorems.signature:
{K V : ℕ} →
  1 < K →
    0 < V →
      (M2RNNComparison.MatState K V →
          M2RNNComparison.Vec K → M2RNNComparison.Vec V → M2RNNComparison.MatState K V) →
        Prop
theorems.proof_body:
fun {K V} hK hV update =>
  update (RecurrentResourceFormalism.embeddedLowerLeftState hK hV)
      (RecurrentResourceFormalism.embeddedMixedKey hK) 0 =
    M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1
      (RecurrentResourceFormalism.embeddedLowerLeftState hK hV)
      (RecurrentResourceFormalism.embeddedMixedKey hK) 0
theorems.name: RecurrentResourceFormalism.ImplementsEmbeddedMixedKeyDeltaCorrection
theorems.doc:
The arbitrary-dimensional mixed-key delta-correction target. It is the same
2D obstruction embedded into any `K ≥ 2, V ≥ 1` state space.

theorems.source_text:
/-- E88/NDM implements the embedded mixed-key delta-correction target in any
dimension with at least two key coordinates and one value coordinate. -/
theorem e88_implements_embedded_mixed_key_delta_correction
    {K V : Nat} (hK : 1 < K) (hV : 0 < V) :
    ImplementsEmbeddedMixedKeyDeltaCorrection hK hV
      (M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1) := by
  rfl
theorems.signature:
∀ {K V : ℕ} (hK : 1 < K) (hV : 0 < V),
  RecurrentResourceFormalism.ImplementsEmbeddedMixedKeyDeltaCorrection hK hV
    (M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1)
theorems.proof_body:
fun {K V} hK hV =>
  Eq.refl
    (M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1
      (RecurrentResourceFormalism.embeddedLowerLeftState hK hV)
      (RecurrentResourceFormalism.embeddedMixedKey hK) 0)
theorems.name: RecurrentResourceFormalism.e88_implements_embedded_mixed_key_delta_correction
theorems.doc:
E88/NDM implements the embedded mixed-key delta-correction target in any
dimension with at least two key coordinates and one value coordinate.

theorems.source_text:
/-- Row-gated fixed-right M2RNN cannot implement the embedded mixed-key
delta-correction target in any larger state space. -/
theorem row_forget_m2rnn_fails_embedded_mixed_key_delta_correction
    {K V : Nat} (hK : 1 < K) (hV : 0 < V)
    (W : Matrix (Fin V) (Fin V) Real) (r : M2RNNComparison.Vec K) :
    ¬ ImplementsEmbeddedMixedKeyDeltaCorrection hK hV
      (m2rnnRowForgetUpdateKV W r) := by
  intro h
  let i0 : Fin K := ⟨0, Nat.lt_trans Nat.zero_lt_one hK⟩
  let j0 : Fin V := ⟨0, hV⟩
  have hentry := congrArg (fun M : M2RNNComparison.MatState K V => M i0 j0) h
  have hbad : Real.tanh (1 : Real) = 0 := by
    simpa [ImplementsEmbeddedMixedKeyDeltaCorrection, m2rnnRowForgetUpdateKV,
      rowForgetCarryKV, M2RNNComparison.m2rnnCandidate,
      M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded, M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaTransition,
      M2RNNComparison.matrixTanh, M2RNNComparison.matrixMap,
      M2RNNComparison.outerKV, embeddedLowerLeftState, embeddedMixedKey,
      Matrix.mul_apply, i0, j0] using hentry
  exact tanh_one_ne_zero hbad
theorems.signature:
∀ {K V : ℕ} (hK : 1 < K) (hV : 0 < V) (W : Matrix (Fin V) (Fin V) ℝ) (r : M2RNNComparison.Vec K),
  ¬RecurrentResourceFormalism.ImplementsEmbeddedMixedKeyDeltaCorrection hK hV
      (RecurrentResourceFormalism.m2rnnRowForgetUpdateKV W r)
theorems.proof_body:
fun {K V} hK hV W r h =>
  let i0 := ⟨0, Nat.lt_trans Nat.zero_lt_one hK⟩;
  let j0 := ⟨0, hV⟩;
  have hentry := congrArg (fun M => M i0 j0) h;
  have hbad :=
    Eq.mp
      (Eq.trans
        (congr
          (congrArg Eq
            (Eq.trans
              (congrArg (fun x => Matrix.of x ⟨0, Nat.lt_trans Nat.zero_lt_one hK⟩ ⟨0, hV⟩)
                (funext fun i =>
                  funext fun j =>
                    congr
                      (congrArg HAdd.hAdd
                        (Eq.trans (mul_ite (i = ⟨1, hK⟩) (r i) (if j = ⟨0, hV⟩ then 1 else 0) 0)
                          (ite_congr (Eq.refl (i = ⟨1, hK⟩))
                            (fun a =>
                              Eq.trans (mul_ite (j = ⟨0, hV⟩) (r i) 1 0)
                                (ite_congr (Eq.refl (j = ⟨0, hV⟩)) (fun a => mul_one (r i)) fun a =>
                                  mul_zero (r i)))
                            fun a => mul_zero (r i))))
                      (congrArg (fun x => (1 - r i) * Matrix.of x i j)
                        (funext fun i =>
                          funext fun j =>
                            congrArg Real.tanh
                              (Eq.trans
                                (congrArg
                                  (fun x =>
                                    ((Matrix.of fun i j =>
                                            if i = ⟨1, hK⟩ then if j = ⟨0, hV⟩ then 1 else 0
                                            else 0) *
                                          W +
                                        Matrix.of x)
                                      i j)
                                  (funext fun i =>
                                    funext fun j =>
                                      mul_zero
                                        (if
                                            i =
                                              ⟨0,
                                                RecurrentResourceFormalism.embeddedMixedKey._proof_1
                                                  hK⟩ then
                                          1
                                        else if i = ⟨1, hK⟩ then 1 else 0)))
                                (Eq.trans
                                  (congrArg (fun x => x + 0)
                                    (Eq.trans
                                      (Eq.trans
                                        (Finset.sum_congr (Eq.refl Finset.univ) fun x a =>
                                          Eq.trans
                                            (ite_mul (i = ⟨1, hK⟩) (if x = ⟨0, hV⟩ then 1 else 0) 0
                                              (W x j))
                                            (ite_congr (Eq.refl (i = ⟨1, hK⟩))
                                              (fun a =>
                                                Eq.trans (ite_mul (x = ⟨0, hV⟩) 1 0 (W x j))
                                                  (ite_congr (Eq.refl (x = ⟨0, hV⟩))
                                                    (fun a => one_mul (W x j)) fun a =>
                                                    zero_mul (W x j)))
                                              fun a => zero_mul (W x j)))
                                        (Finset.sum_ite_irrel (i = ⟨1, hK⟩) Finset.univ
                                          (fun x => if x = ⟨0, hV⟩ then W x j else 0) fun x => 0))
                                      (ite_congr (Eq.refl (i = ⟨1, hK⟩))
                                        (fun a =>
                                          Eq.trans
                                            (Finset.sum_ite_eq' Finset.univ ⟨0, hV⟩ fun x => W x j)

theorems.name: RecurrentResourceFormalism.row_forget_m2rnn_fails_embedded_mixed_key_delta_correction
theorems.doc:
Row-gated fixed-right M2RNN cannot implement the embedded mixed-key
delta-correction target in any larger state space.

theorems.source_text:
/-- Column-gated fixed-right M2RNN cannot implement the embedded mixed-key
delta-correction target in any larger state space. -/
theorem column_forget_m2rnn_fails_embedded_mixed_key_delta_correction
    {K V : Nat} (hK : 1 < K) (hV : 0 < V)
    (W : Matrix (Fin V) (Fin V) Real) (c : M2RNNComparison.Vec V) :
    ¬ ImplementsEmbeddedMixedKeyDeltaCorrection hK hV
      (m2rnnColumnForgetUpdateKV W c) := by
  intro h
  let i0 : Fin K := ⟨0, Nat.lt_trans Nat.zero_lt_one hK⟩
  let j0 : Fin V := ⟨0, hV⟩
  have hentry := congrArg (fun M : M2RNNComparison.MatState K V => M i0 j0) h
  have hbad : Real.tanh (1 : Real) = 0 := by
    simpa [ImplementsEmbeddedMixedKeyDeltaCorrection, m2rnnColumnForgetUpdateKV,
      columnForgetCarryKV, M2RNNComparison.m2rnnCandidate,
      M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded, M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaTransition,
      M2RNNComparison.matrixTanh, M2RNNComparison.matrixMap,
      M2RNNComparison.outerKV, embeddedLowerLeftState, embeddedMixedKey,
      Matrix.mul_apply, i0, j0] using hentry
  exact tanh_one_ne_zero hbad
theorems.signature:
∀ {K V : ℕ} (hK : 1 < K) (hV : 0 < V) (W : Matrix (Fin V) (Fin V) ℝ) (c : M2RNNComparison.Vec V),
  ¬RecurrentResourceFormalism.ImplementsEmbeddedMixedKeyDeltaCorrection hK hV
      (RecurrentResourceFormalism.m2rnnColumnForgetUpdateKV W c)
theorems.proof_body:
fun {K V} hK hV W c h =>
  let i0 := ⟨0, Nat.lt_trans Nat.zero_lt_one hK⟩;
  let j0 := ⟨0, hV⟩;
  have hentry := congrArg (fun M => M i0 j0) h;
  have hbad :=
    Eq.mp
      (Eq.trans
        (congr
          (congrArg Eq
            (Eq.trans
              (congrArg (fun x => Matrix.of x ⟨0, Nat.lt_trans Nat.zero_lt_one hK⟩ ⟨0, hV⟩)
                (funext fun i =>
                  funext fun j =>
                    congr
                      (congrArg HAdd.hAdd
                        (Eq.trans (mul_ite (i = ⟨1, hK⟩) (c j) (if j = ⟨0, hV⟩ then 1 else 0) 0)
                          (ite_congr (Eq.refl (i = ⟨1, hK⟩))
                            (fun a =>
                              Eq.trans (mul_ite (j = ⟨0, hV⟩) (c j) 1 0)
                                (ite_congr (Eq.refl (j = ⟨0, hV⟩)) (fun a => mul_one (c j)) fun a =>
                                  mul_zero (c j)))
                            fun a => mul_zero (c j))))
                      (congrArg (fun x => (1 - c j) * Matrix.of x i j)
                        (funext fun i =>
                          funext fun j =>
                            congrArg Real.tanh
                              (Eq.trans
                                (congrArg
                                  (fun x =>
                                    ((Matrix.of fun i j =>
                                            if i = ⟨1, hK⟩ then if j = ⟨0, hV⟩ then 1 else 0
                                            else 0) *
                                          W +
                                        Matrix.of x)
                                      i j)
                                  (funext fun i =>
                                    funext fun j =>
                                      mul_zero
                                        (if
                                            i =
                                              ⟨0,
                                                RecurrentResourceFormalism.embeddedMixedKey._proof_1
                                                  hK⟩ then
                                          1
                                        else if i = ⟨1, hK⟩ then 1 else 0)))
                                (Eq.trans
                                  (congrArg (fun x => x + 0)
                                    (Eq.trans
                                      (Eq.trans
                                        (Finset.sum_congr (Eq.refl Finset.univ) fun x a =>
                                          Eq.trans
                                            (ite_mul (i = ⟨1, hK⟩) (if x = ⟨0, hV⟩ then 1 else 0) 0
                                              (W x j))
                                            (ite_congr (Eq.refl (i = ⟨1, hK⟩))
                                              (fun a =>
                                                Eq.trans (ite_mul (x = ⟨0, hV⟩) 1 0 (W x j))
                                                  (ite_congr (Eq.refl (x = ⟨0, hV⟩))
                                                    (fun a => one_mul (W x j)) fun a =>
                                                    zero_mul (W x j)))
                                              fun a => zero_mul (W x j)))

                                          (fun x => if x = ⟨0, hV⟩ then W x j else 0) fun x => 0))
                                      (ite_congr (Eq.refl (i = ⟨1, hK⟩))
                                        (fun a =>

                                            (Finset.sum_ite_eq' Finset.univ ⟨0, hV⟩ fun x => W x j)
                                            (ite_cond_eq_true (W ⟨0, hV⟩ j) 0
                                              (Finset.mem_univ._simp_1 ⟨0, hV⟩)))
                                        fun a => Finset.sum_const_zero)))
                                  (add_zero (if i = ⟨1, hK⟩ then W ⟨0, hV⟩ j else 0))))))))

                    (ite_cond_eq_false (if ⟨0, hV⟩ = ⟨0, hV⟩ then c ⟨0, hV⟩ else 0) 0
                      (Eq.trans (Fin.mk.injEq 0 (Nat.lt_trans Nat.zero_lt_one hK) 1 hK)

                  (Eq.trans
                    (congrArg (HMul.hMul (1 - c ⟨0, hV⟩))
                      (Eq.trans
                        (congrArg Real.tanh
                          (ite_cond_eq_false (W ⟨0, hV⟩ ⟨0, hV⟩) 0
                            (Eq.trans (Fin.mk.injEq 0 (Nat.lt_trans Nat.zero_lt_one hK) 1 hK)

                        Real.tanh_zero))
                    (mul_zero (1 - c ⟨0, hV⟩))))
                (add_zero 0))))
          (Eq.trans
            (congrArg (fun x => Matrix.of x ⟨0, Nat.lt_trans Nat.zero_lt_one hK⟩ ⟨0, hV⟩)

                  congrArg Real.tanh

                            (congr (congrArg HSub.hSub (one_smul ℝ 1))
                              (congrArg (⇑Matrix.of)

                                  funext fun j =>
                                    Eq.trans
                                      (mul_ite
                                        (j =

                                            RecurrentResourceFormalism.embeddedMixedKey._proof_1

                                                  hK⟩ then
                                          1

                                        1 (if j = ⟨1, hK⟩ then 1 else 0))

                                        fun a =>

                                            (if

                                                    RecurrentResourceFormalism.embeddedMixedKey._proof_1
                                                      hK⟩ then

                                            else if i = ⟨1, hK⟩ then 1 else 0)

                                                          hK⟩ then
                                                  1

                                    (1 i x -

theorems.name: RecurrentResourceFormalism.column_forget_m2rnn_fails_embedded_mixed_key_delta_correction
theorems.doc:
Column-gated fixed-right M2RNN cannot implement the embedded mixed-key
delta-correction target in any larger state space.

theorems.source_text:
/-- Cellwise-gated fixed-right M2RNN cannot implement the embedded mixed-key
delta-correction target in any larger state space. -/
theorem cell_forget_m2rnn_fails_embedded_mixed_key_delta_correction
    {K V : Nat} (hK : 1 < K) (hV : 0 < V)
    (W : Matrix (Fin V) (Fin V) Real)
    (g : M2RNNComparison.MatState K V) :
    ¬ ImplementsEmbeddedMixedKeyDeltaCorrection hK hV
      (m2rnnCellForgetUpdateKV W g) := by
  intro h
  let i0 : Fin K := ⟨0, Nat.lt_trans Nat.zero_lt_one hK⟩
  let j0 : Fin V := ⟨0, hV⟩
  have hentry := congrArg (fun M : M2RNNComparison.MatState K V => M i0 j0) h
  have hbad : Real.tanh (1 : Real) = 0 := by
    simpa [ImplementsEmbeddedMixedKeyDeltaCorrection, m2rnnCellForgetUpdateKV,
      cellForgetCarryKV, M2RNNComparison.m2rnnCandidate,
      M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded, M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaTransition,
      M2RNNComparison.matrixTanh, M2RNNComparison.matrixMap,
      M2RNNComparison.outerKV, embeddedLowerLeftState, embeddedMixedKey,
      Matrix.mul_apply, i0, j0] using hentry
  exact tanh_one_ne_zero hbad
theorems.signature:
∀ {K V : ℕ} (hK : 1 < K) (hV : 0 < V) (W : Matrix (Fin V) (Fin V) ℝ)
  (g : M2RNNComparison.MatState K V),
  ¬RecurrentResourceFormalism.ImplementsEmbeddedMixedKeyDeltaCorrection hK hV
      (RecurrentResourceFormalism.m2rnnCellForgetUpdateKV W g)
theorems.proof_body:
fun {K V} hK hV W g h =>

  have hbad :=

                                            else 0) *

                                      i j)
                                  (funext fun i =>
                                    funext fun j =>
                                      mul_zero
                                        (if
                                            i =
                                              ⟨0,
                                                RecurrentResourceFormalism.embeddedMixedKey._proof_1
                                                  hK⟩ then
                                          1

                                              (W x j))

                                              (fun a =>

                                                  (ite_congr (Eq.refl (x = ⟨0, hV⟩))

                                              fun a => zero_mul (W x j)))

                                          (fun x => if x = ⟨0, hV⟩ then W x j else 0) fun x => 0))

                                            (ite_cond_eq_true (W ⟨0, hV⟩ j) 0
                                              (Finset.mem_univ._simp_1 ⟨0, hV⟩)))
                                        fun a => Finset.sum_const_zero)))
                                  (add_zero (if i = ⟨1, hK⟩ then W ⟨0, hV⟩ j else 0))))))))
              (Eq.trans
                (congr

                      else 0)

                  (Eq.trans
                    (congrArg (HMul.hMul (1 - g ⟨0, Nat.lt_trans Nat.zero_lt_one hK⟩ ⟨0, hV⟩))

                                                hK⟩ then
                                        1
                                      else if i = ⟨1, hK⟩ then 1 else 0
                                    else
                                      if ⟨1, hK⟩ = ⟨1, hK⟩ then
                                        if
                                            i =
                                              ⟨0,
                                                RecurrentResourceFormalism.embeddedMixedKey._proof_1
                                                  hK⟩ then
                                          1
                                        else if i = ⟨1, hK⟩ then 1 else 0
                                      else 0
                                else 0)
                                0 (Finset.mem_univ._simp_1 ⟨1, hK⟩))
                              (ite_congr (Eq.refl (j = ⟨0, hV⟩))
                                (fun a =>
                                  congrArg (HSub.hSub (1 i ⟨1, hK⟩))
                                    (Eq.trans
                                      (ite_cond_eq_false
                                        (if
                                            i =
                                              ⟨0,
                                                RecurrentResourceFormalism.embeddedMixedKey._proof_1
                                                  hK⟩ then
                                          1
                                        else if i = ⟨1, hK⟩ then 1 else 0)
                                        (if ⟨1, hK⟩ = ⟨1, hK⟩ then
                                          if
                                              i =
                                                ⟨0,
                                                  RecurrentResourceFormalism.embeddedMixedKey._proof_1
                                                    hK⟩ then
                                            1
                                          else if i = ⟨1, hK⟩ then 1 else 0
                                        else 0)
                                        (Eq.trans
                                          (Fin.mk.injEq 1 hK 0
                                            (RecurrentResourceFormalism.embeddedMixedKey._proof_1
                                              hK))
                                          one_ne_zero._simp_1))
                                      (ite_cond_eq_true
                                        (if
                                            i =
                                              ⟨0,
                                                RecurrentResourceFormalism.embeddedMixedKey._proof_1
                                                  hK⟩ then
                                          1
                                        else if i = ⟨1, hK⟩ then 1 else 0)
                                        0 (eq_self ⟨1, hK⟩))))
                                fun a => Eq.refl 0))))
                        (add_zero
                          (if j = ⟨0, hV⟩ then
                            1 i ⟨1, hK⟩ -
                              if
                                  i =
                                    ⟨0,
                                      RecurrentResourceFormalism.embeddedMixedKey._proof_1 hK⟩ then
                                1
                              else if i = ⟨1, hK⟩ then 1 else 0
                          else 0))))))
            (Eq.trans
              (congrArg Real.tanh
                (Eq.trans
                  (ite_cond_eq_true
                    (1 ⟨0, Nat.lt_trans Nat.zero_lt_one hK⟩ ⟨1, hK⟩ -
                      if
                          ⟨0, Nat.lt_trans Nat.zero_lt_one hK⟩ =
                            ⟨0, RecurrentResourceFormalism.embeddedMixedKey._proof_1 hK⟩ then
                        1
                      else if ⟨0, Nat.lt_trans Nat.zero_lt_one hK⟩ = ⟨1, hK⟩ then 1 else 0)
                    0 (eq_self ⟨0, hV⟩))
                  (Eq.trans
                    (congr
                      (congrArg HSub.hSub
                        (Matrix.one_apply_ne
                          (of_eq_true
                            (Eq.trans
                              (congrArg Not
                                (Eq.trans (Fin.mk.injEq 0 (Nat.lt_trans Nat.zero_lt_one hK) 1 hK)
                                  zero_ne_one._simp_1))
                              not_false_eq_true))))
                      (ite_cond_eq_true 1
                        (if ⟨0, Nat.lt_trans Nat.zero_lt_one hK⟩ = ⟨1, hK⟩ then 1 else 0)
                        (eq_self ⟨0, Nat.lt_trans Nat.zero_lt_one hK⟩)))
                    (zero_sub 1))))
              (Real.tanh_neg 1))))
        one_eq_inv._simp_4)
      hentry;
  RecurrentResourceFormalism.tanh_one_ne_zero hbad
theorems.name: RecurrentResourceFormalism.cell_forget_m2rnn_fails_embedded_mixed_key_delta_correction
theorems.doc:
Cellwise-gated fixed-right M2RNN cannot implement the embedded mixed-key
delta-correction target in any larger state space.

  match (motive :=
    RecurrentResourceFormalism.FixedRightRawExternalForgetKV K V →

theorems.source_text:
/-- General embedding theorem: the one-step separation is not a 2D artifact.

For every key dimension `K ≥ 2` and value dimension `V ≥ 1`, E88/NDM implements
the embedded mixed-key delta correction in one recurrent step, while every
fixed-right/raw-write M2RNN-style resource with external row/column/cell forget
fails on the embedded witness.
-/
theorem emender_m2rnn_one_step_resource_separation_embeds
    {K V : Nat} (hK : 1 < K) (hV : 0 < V) :
    ImplementsEmbeddedMixedKeyDeltaCorrection hK hV
      (M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1) ∧
    ∀ resource : FixedRightRawExternalForgetKV K V,
      ¬ ImplementsEmbeddedMixedKeyDeltaCorrection hK hV resource.update := by
  constructor
  · exact e88_implements_embedded_mixed_key_delta_correction hK hV
  · intro resource
    cases resource with
    | row W r =>
        exact row_forget_m2rnn_fails_embedded_mixed_key_delta_correction hK hV W r
    | column W c =>
        exact column_forget_m2rnn_fails_embedded_mixed_key_delta_correction hK hV W c
    | cell W g =>
        exact cell_forget_m2rnn_fails_embedded_mixed_key_delta_correction hK hV W g
theorems.signature:
∀ {K V : ℕ} (hK : 1 < K) (hV : 0 < V),
  RecurrentResourceFormalism.ImplementsEmbeddedMixedKeyDeltaCorrection hK hV
      (M2RNNComparison.e88DeltaUpdateExpanded 1) ∧
    ∀ (resource : RecurrentResourceFormalism.FixedRightRawExternalForgetKV K V),
      ¬RecurrentResourceFormalism.ImplementsEmbeddedMixedKeyDeltaCorrection hK hV resource.update
theorems.proof_body:
fun {K V} hK hV =>
  ⟨RecurrentResourceFormalism.e88_implements_embedded_mixed_key_delta_correction hK hV,
    fun resource =>
    RecurrentResourceFormalism.FixedRightRawExternalForgetKV.casesOn (motive := fun t =>
      resource = t →
        ¬RecurrentResourceFormalism.ImplementsEmbeddedMixedKeyDeltaCorrection hK hV resource.update)
      resource
      (fun W r h =>
        Eq.symm h ▸
          RecurrentResourceFormalism.row_forget_m2rnn_fails_embedded_mixed_key_delta_correction hK
            hV W r)
      (fun W c h =>
        Eq.symm h ▸
          RecurrentResourceFormalism.column_forget_m2rnn_fails_embedded_mixed_key_delta_correction
            hK hV W c)
      (fun W g h =>
        Eq.symm h ▸
          RecurrentResourceFormalism.cell_forget_m2rnn_fails_embedded_mixed_key_delta_correction hK
            hV W g)
      (Eq.refl resource)⟩
theorems.name: RecurrentResourceFormalism.emender_m2rnn_one_step_resource_separation_embeds
theorems.doc:
General embedding theorem: the one-step separation is not a 2D artifact.

For every key dimension `K ≥ 2` and value dimension `V ≥ 1`, E88/NDM implements
the embedded mixed-key delta correction in one recurrent step, while every
fixed-right/raw-write M2RNN-style resource with external row/column/cell forget
fails on the embedded witness.

theorems.source_text:
/-- Whether an architecture has an explicit external forget gate applied after
the nonlinear candidate (i.e., the carry is placed outside the nonlinearity).
`outsideNonlinearity`: M2RNN-style scalar, row, or column forget gate.
`residualReadout`: highway connection after the layer output.
All other carry placements (including `insideNonlinearity` for NDM) return
`false`. -/
def hasExternalForgetGate (a : ArchitectureSignature) : Bool :=
  match a.carryPlacement with
  | .outsideNonlinearity => true
  | .residualReadout     => true
  | _                    => false
theorems.signature: RecurrentResourceFormalism.ArchitectureSignature → Bool
theorems.proof_body:
fun a =>
  match a.carryPlacement with
  | RecurrentResourceFormalism.CarryPlacement.outsideNonlinearity => true
  | RecurrentResourceFormalism.CarryPlacement.residualReadout => true
  | x => false
theorems.name: RecurrentResourceFormalism.hasExternalForgetGate

{motive : RecurrentResourceFormalism.CarryPlacement → Sort u} →
  (t : RecurrentResourceFormalism.CarryPlacement) →
    motive RecurrentResourceFormalism.CarryPlacement.outsideNonlinearity →
      motive RecurrentResourceFormalism.CarryPlacement.residualReadout →
        (t.ctorIdx ≠ 2 → t.ctorIdx ≠ 3 → motive t) → motive t

  RecurrentResourceFormalism.CarryPlacement.rec (motive := fun t =>
    (t.ctorIdx ≠ 2 → t.ctorIdx ≠ 3 → motive t) → motive t) (fun x => x ⋯ ⋯) (fun x => x ⋯ ⋯)
    (fun x => outsideNonlinearity) (fun x => residualReadout) t

theorems.source_text:
/-- Per-head per-token FLOP count in the transparent cost model defined above.

- Without external forget gate: `6 * stateScalarsPerHead`
- With external forget gate:    `7 * stateScalarsPerHead`

Depends only on `stateScalarsPerHead` and `hasExternalForgetGate`. -/
def flopsPerToken (a : ArchitectureSignature) : ℕ :=
  if hasExternalForgetGate a
  then 7 * a.stateScalarsPerHead
  else 6 * a.stateScalarsPerHead
theorems.signature: RecurrentResourceFormalism.ArchitectureSignature → ℕ
theorems.proof_body:
fun a =>
  if RecurrentResourceFormalism.hasExternalForgetGate a = true then 7 * a.stateScalarsPerHead
  else 6 * a.stateScalarsPerHead
theorems.name: RecurrentResourceFormalism.flopsPerToken
theorems.doc:
Per-head per-token FLOP count in the transparent cost model defined above.

- Without external forget gate: `6 * stateScalarsPerHead`
- With external forget gate:    `7 * stateScalarsPerHead`

Depends only on `stateScalarsPerHead` and `hasExternalForgetGate`.

theorems.source_text:
/-- **F3 — Per-token FLOP class equivalence (Pillar 3 Lean anchor).**

For matched state dimension `d` (NDM state = d × d scalars, M2RNN state =
d × d scalars), head count `H`, and stack depth `depth`, the per-head
per-token FLOP costs are:

1. `flopsPerToken(NDM)    = 6 · d²`  (delta carry inside nonlinearity; no gate)
2. `flopsPerToken(M2RNN)  = 7 · d²`  (external forget gate adds one extra pass)
3. Both are bounded above by `7 · d²` (`c₁ = 7, c₂ = 0` in `c₁ · d² + c₂ · d`).
4. The two counts are within a factor of 2 of each other:
   `flopsPerToken(M2RNN) ≤ 2 · flopsPerToken(NDM)`.

Consequence: equal-token-budget comparisons at matched `(d, H, depth)` are
NOT confounded by a FLOP-budget asymmetry.  The empirical FLOPs-per-bit
convergence (Figure 3) is therefore not a token-budget artifact.

This theorem makes NO claim about learning-rate convergence.  It is a pure
combinatorial cost statement. -/
theorem emender_m2rnn_flop_class_equiv (d H depth : Nat) :
    flopsPerToken (emender depth H d) = 6 * (d * d) ∧
    flopsPerToken (m2rnnPure depth H (d * d)) = 7 * (d * d) ∧
    flopsPerToken (emender depth H d) ≤ 7 * (d * d) ∧
    flopsPerToken (m2rnnPure depth H (d * d)) ≤ 7 * (d * d) ∧
    flopsPerToken (m2rnnPure depth H (d * d)) ≤ 2 * flopsPerToken (emender depth H d) := by
  have h1 : flopsPerToken (emender depth H d) = 6 * (d * d) := rfl
  have h2 : flopsPerToken (m2rnnPure depth H (d * d)) = 7 * (d * d) := rfl

                                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_zero
                                        (↑d ^ Nat.rawCast 2 * Nat.rawCast 6 + 0)))

                                      (↑d ^ Nat.rawCast 2 * Nat.rawCast 1 + 0))
                                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_zero
                                      (↑d ^ Nat.rawCast 2 * Nat.rawCast 6 + 0))))
                                (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_mul
                                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_add
                                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_pf_right (↑d) (Nat.rawCast 2)
                                      (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.to_raw_eq
                                        (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isNat_mul (Eq.refl HMul.hMul)
                                          (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.of_raw ℤ 2)
                                          (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.of_raw ℤ 6) (Eq.refl 12))))
                                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_zero (Nat.rawCast 2))
                                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_zero
                                      (↑d ^ Nat.rawCast 2 * Nat.rawCast 12 + 0)))
                                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.zero_mul
                                    (↑d ^ Nat.rawCast 2 * Nat.rawCast 6 + 0))
                                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_zero
                                    (↑d ^ Nat.rawCast 2 * Nat.rawCast 12 + 0))))

                                (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_zero
                                  (↑d ^ Nat.rawCast 2 * Nat.rawCast 12 + 0))))
                            (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_congr
                              (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.cast_pos
                                (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isNat_ofNat ℤ (Eq.refl 7)))
                              (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_congr (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.atom_pf ↑d)
                                (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.atom_pf ↑d)
                                (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_mul
                                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_add
                                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_pp_pf_overlap (↑d)
                                      (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.to_raw_eq
                                        (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isNat_add (Eq.refl HAdd.hAdd)
                                          (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.of_raw ℕ 1)
                                          (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.of_raw ℕ 1) (Eq.refl 2)))
                                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.one_mul (Nat.rawCast 1)))
                                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_zero
                                      (↑d ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1))
                                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_zero
                                      (↑d ^ Nat.rawCast 2 * Nat.rawCast 1 + 0)))
                                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.zero_mul
                                    (↑d ^ Nat.rawCast 1 * Nat.rawCast 1 + 0))

                                    (↑d ^ Nat.rawCast 2 * Nat.rawCast 1 + 0))))
                              (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_mul
                                (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_add
                                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_pf_right (↑d) (Nat.rawCast 2)
                                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_one (Nat.rawCast 7)))
                                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.mul_zero (Nat.rawCast 7))
                                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_zero
                                    (↑d ^ Nat.rawCast 2 * Nat.rawCast 7 + 0)))

                                  (↑d ^ Nat.rawCast 2 * Nat.rawCast 1 + 0))
                                (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_zero
                                  (↑d ^ Nat.rawCast 2 * Nat.rawCast 7 + 0))))
                            (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.sub_pf
                              (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_add
                                (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_mul (↑d) (Nat.rawCast 2)
                                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_one_mul
                                    (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.to_raw_eq
                                      (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isInt_mul (Eq.refl HMul.hMul)
                                        (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.of_raw ℤ (Int.negOfNat 1))

                                          (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.of_raw ℤ 7))
                                        (Eq.refl (Int.negOfNat 7))))))
                                Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.neg_zero)
                              (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_lt (Nat.rawCast 1)
                                (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_overlap
                                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_overlap_pf (↑d) (Nat.rawCast 2)
                                    (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.to_raw_eq
                                      (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.to_isNat
                                        (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isInt_add (Eq.refl HAdd.hAdd)
                                          (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.to_isInt
                                            (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.of_raw ℤ 12))
                                          (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.of_raw ℤ (Int.negOfNat 7))
                                          (Eq.refl (Int.ofNat 5))))))
                                  (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_zero_add 0)))))
                          (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_overlap_zero
                            (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.to_isNat
                              (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isInt_add (Eq.refl HAdd.hAdd)
                                (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.of_raw ℤ (Int.negOfNat 1))
                                (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.to_isInt

                                (Eq.refl (Int.ofNat 0))))
                            (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_add_overlap_zero
                              (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_overlap_pf_zero (↑d) (Nat.rawCast 2)
                                (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.to_isNat
                                  (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isInt_add (Eq.refl HAdd.hAdd)
                                    (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsInt.of_raw ℤ (Int.negOfNat 5))
                                    (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.to_isInt
                                      (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.IsNat.of_raw ℤ 5))
                                    (Eq.refl (Int.ofNat 0)))))
                              (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.add_pf_zero_add 0))))
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Ring.cast_zero
                          (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isNat_ofNat ℤ (Eq.refl 0)))))
                    (Mathlib.Tactic.Linarith.add_lt_of_neg_of_le
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Linarith.add_lt_of_neg_of_le
                        (neg_neg_of_pos Mathlib.Tactic.Linarith.zero_lt_one)
                        (Mathlib.Tactic.Linarith.mul_nonpos
                          (Mathlib.Tactic.Linarith.sub_nonpos_of_le (mul_self_nonneg ↑d))
                          (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isNat_lt_true
                            (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isNat_ofNat ℤ (Eq.refl 0))
                            (Mathlib.Meta.NormNum.isNat_ofNat ℤ (Eq.refl 5)) (Eq.refl false))))
                      (Mathlib.Tactic.Linarith.sub_nonpos_of_le
                        (Int.add_one_le_iff.mpr
                          (id
                            (Eq.mp
                              (Eq.trans
                                (Mathlib.Tactic.Zify.natCast_lt._simp_1 (2 * (6 * (d * d)))
                                  (7 * (d * d)))
                                (congr
                                  (congrArg LT.lt
                                    (Eq.trans (Nat.cast_mul 2 (6 * (d * d)))
                                      (congrArg (HMul.hMul 2)
                                        (Eq.trans (Nat.cast_mul 6 (d * d))
                                          (congrArg (HMul.hMul 6) (Nat.cast_mul d d))))))
                                  (Eq.trans (Nat.cast_mul 7 (d * d))
                                    (congrArg (HMul.hMul 7) (Nat.cast_mul d d)))))
                              a))))))⟩⟩⟩⟩
theorems.name: RecurrentResourceFormalism.emender_m2rnn_flop_class_equiv
theorems.doc:
**F3 — Per-token FLOP class equivalence (Pillar 3 Lean anchor).**

For matched state dimension `d` (NDM state = d × d scalars, M2RNN state =
d × d scalars), head count `H`, and stack depth `depth`, the per-head
per-token FLOP costs are:

1. `flopsPerToken(NDM)    = 6 · d²`  (delta carry inside nonlinearity; no gate)
2. `flopsPerToken(M2RNN)  = 7 · d²`  (external forget gate adds one extra pass)
3. Both are bounded above by `7 · d²` (`c₁ = 7, c₂ = 0` in `c₁ · d² + c₂ · d`).
4. The two counts are within a factor of 2 of each other:
   `flopsPerToken(M2RNN) ≤ 2 · flopsPerToken(NDM)`.

Consequence: equal-token-budget comparisons at matched `(d, H, depth)` are
NOT confounded by a FLOP-budget asymmetry.  The empirical FLOPs-per-bit
convergence (Figure 3) is therefore not a token-budget artifact.

This theorem makes NO claim about learning-rate convergence.  It is a pure
combinatorial cost statement.

theorems.source_text:
/-- CMA-ES-shaped M2RNN signature, instantiated from `m2rnnPure` with geometry
drawn from the NDM CMA-best config in `docs/CMA_FLOP_RATE_FINDING.md` §4.1.

**M2RNN is absent from the CMA sweep itself** — the driver registered both
`m2rnn` and `m2rnn-paper` but the `cmaes_converge` benchmark predates the
integration (see `docs/CMA_FLOP_RATE_FINDING.md` §2, "M2RNN is missing from
this sweep"). We therefore use the NDM CMA-best geometry (depth 22, 70 heads
per layer, 256 state scalars per head — matching NDM's CMA-found n_heads=70
and n_state=16 giving 16×16=256 state scalars/head) as a CMA-representative
proxy for M2RNN. The actual ~480M CMA-tuned M2RNN run is an open data gap
noted in the CMA finding document; the predicate proof below is valid for this
shape regardless, as it depends only on the head count and stack type, not the
update rule. -/
def m2rnnCMAShape : ArchitectureSignature :=
  m2rnnPure 22 70 256
theorems.signature: RecurrentResourceFormalism.ArchitectureSignature
theorems.proof_body: RecurrentResourceFormalism.m2rnnPure 22 70 256

theorems.source_text:
/-- A recurrent stack is *multi-programmed* if it exposes many independent
recurrent programs per layer, maintains non-trivial per-head state tiles, and
runs each (layer, head, batch) triple independently with no cross-batch or
cross-position state coupling. -/
def IsMultiProgrammed (sig : ArchitectureSignature) : Prop :=
  sig.headsPerLayer ≥ 2 ∧
  sig.stateScalarsPerHead > 0 ∧
  sig.pureRecurrentStack = true ∧
  sig.implementationMode = .sequentialManyProgram
theorems.signature: RecurrentResourceFormalism.ArchitectureSignature → Prop
theorems.proof_body:
fun sig =>
  sig.headsPerLayer ≥ 2 ∧
    sig.stateScalarsPerHead > 0 ∧
      sig.pureRecurrentStack = true ∧
        sig.implementationMode = RecurrentResourceFormalism.ImplementationMode.sequentialManyProgram
theorems.name: RecurrentResourceFormalism.IsMultiProgrammed
theorems.doc:
A recurrent stack is *multi-programmed* if it exposes many independent
recurrent programs per layer, maintains non-trivial per-head state tiles, and
runs each (layer, head, batch) triple independently with no cross-batch or
cross-position state coupling.

theorems.source_text:
/-- Both the 1.27B NDM/E88 signature and the CMA-ES-shaped M2RNN signature
satisfy `IsMultiProgrammed`.

This is the Lean anchor for Pillar 1: multi-programming is not NDM-specific.
Two architectures with distinct update families (NDM's input-dependent left
transition delta rule vs. M2RNN's fixed-learned right transition raw-write)
both satisfy the predicate, confirming that it is about scheduling geometry
rather than update semantics. -/
theorem multiProgrammed_admits_m2rnn_and_emender :
    IsMultiProgrammed e88NDM_1p27B ∧ IsMultiProgrammed m2rnnCMAShape := by
  exact ⟨⟨by decide, by decide, rfl, rfl⟩, ⟨by decide, by decide, rfl, rfl⟩⟩
theorems.signature:
RecurrentResourceFormalism.IsMultiProgrammed RecurrentResourceFormalism.e88NDM_1p27B ∧
  RecurrentResourceFormalism.IsMultiProgrammed RecurrentResourceFormalism.m2rnnCMAShape
theorems.proof_body:
⟨⟨of_decide_eq_true (id (Eq.refl true)), ⟨of_decide_eq_true (id (Eq.refl true)), ⟨rfl, rfl⟩⟩⟩,
  ⟨of_decide_eq_true (id (Eq.refl true)), ⟨of_decide_eq_true (id (Eq.refl true)), ⟨rfl, rfl⟩⟩⟩⟩
theorems.name: RecurrentResourceFormalism.multiProgrammed_admits_m2rnn_and_emender
theorems.doc:
Both the 1.27B NDM/E88 signature and the CMA-ES-shaped M2RNN signature
satisfy `IsMultiProgrammed`.
